comparisons.root_cause_hint: Foreground session waiting for LGWR to flush redo to disk on COMMIT. >20ms avg = slow storage. High count = too many commits.

comparisons.root_cause_hint: Single-block read ??? index lookup or rowid fetch. High count = many index scans. High avg latency = storage problem.

pathology_investigate: large table scans in top SQL

v_cnt := SQL%ROWCOUNT; COMMIT; pkg_log.metric ('No of Statisticsl Fcst records copied are:', v_cnt); scpomgr.pkg_ddl.gather_table_stats ('UDT_STAT_FCST', 8); DELETE /*+ PARALLEL */ FROM SCPOMGR.FCSTDRAFT f WHERE EXISTS (SELECT /*+ PARALLEL */ 1 FROM S CPOMGR.DFUVIEW d WHERE f.dmdunit = d.dmdunit AND f.dmdgroup = d.dmdgroup AND f.loc = d.loc AND d.u_generate_statfcst in (0, 2)); EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN pkg_job.fatal_error; RAISE; EN D;

sql_maintenance.sql_text_truncated: DECLARE v_cnt NUMBER; BEGIN scpomgr.pkg_ddl.truncate_table ('UDT_STAT_FCST_BKP'); INSERT /*+ APPEND */ INTO scpomgr.UDT_STAT_FCST_BKP select /*+ PARALLEL */ dmdunit, dmdgroup, loc, u_level, startdate,
sql_maintenance.sql_text_full: DECLARE v_cnt NUMBER; BEGIN scpomgr.pkg_ddl.truncate_table ('UDT_STAT_FCST_BKP'); INSERT /*+ APPEND */ INTO scpomgr.UDT_STAT_FCST_BKP select /*+ PARALLEL */ dmdunit, dmdgroup, loc, u_level, startdate, dur, qty, slsfcst, regfcst, finalfcst, manualfcst from scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst; scpomgr.pkg_ddl.truncate_table ('UDT_STAT_FCST'); EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'ALTER SESSION ENABLE PARALLEL DML'; INSERT /*+ APPEND */ INTO scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst (dmdunit, dmdgroup, loc, startdate, dur, u_level, qty) SELECT /*+ PARALLEL */ f.dmdunit, f.dmdgroup, f.loc, f.startdate, f.dur , d.u_level, SUM (f.qty) qty FROM scpomgr.fcstdraft f, (SELECT dmdunit, dmdgroup, loc, u_level FROM scpomgr.dfuview WHERE u_generate_statfcst in (1, 2) and u_level = 'MAT-Customer-Loc') d WHERE d.dmdunit = f.dmdunit AND d.dmdgroup = f.dmdgroup AND d.loc = f.loc AND f.TYPE IN (1, 4, 8) GROUP BY f.dmdunit, f.dmdgroup, f.loc, f.startdate, f.dur, d.u_level; v_cnt := SQL%ROWCOUNT; COMMIT; pkg_log.metric ('No of Statisticsl Fcst records copied are:', v_cnt); scpomgr.pkg_ddl.gather_table_stats ('UDT_STAT_FCST', 8); DELETE /*+ PARALLEL */ FROM SCPOMGR.FCSTDRAFT f WHERE EXISTS (SELECT /*+ PARALLEL */ 1 FROM S CPOMGR.DFUVIEW d WHERE f.dmdunit = d.dmdunit AND f.dmdgroup = d.dmdgroup AND f.loc = d.loc AND d.u_generate_statfcst in (0, 2)); v_cnt := SQL%ROWCOUNT; COMMIT; pkg_log.metric ( 'Deleted Stat Fcst reference records from FCSTDRAFT:', v_cnt); scpomgr.pkg_ddl.gather_table_stats ('FCSTDRAFT', 8); EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'ALTER SESSION DISABLE PARALLEL DML'; merge into scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst d using (select dmdunit, dmdgroup, loc, u_level, startdate, dur, qty, slsfcst, regfcst, finalfcst, manualfcst from scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst_bkp) s on (s.dmdunit=d.dmdunit and s.dmdgroup=d.dmdgroup and s.loc=d.loc and s.startdate=d.startdate) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET d.slsfcst=s.slsfcst, d.regfcst=s.regfcst, d.finalfcst=s.finalfcst, d.manualfcst=s.manualfcst WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT /*+ APPEND */ ( d.dmdunit, d.dmdgroup, d.loc, d.startdate, d.slsfcst, d.regfcst, d.finalfcst, d.u_level, d.dur, d.qty, d.manualfcst ) values ( s.dmdunit, s.dmdgroup, s.loc, s.startdate, s.slsfcst, s.regfcst, s.finalfcst, s.u_level, s.dur, 0, s.manualfcst ); merge into scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst d using (select dmdunit, dmdgroup, loc, disc from scpomgr.DFU) s on (s.dmdunit=d.dmdunit and s.dmdgroup=d.dmdgroup and s.loc=d.loc) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET d.slsfcst=0, d.regfcst=0, d.finalfcst=0, d.manualfcst=-0.001 where d.startdate > s.disc and disc <> TO_DATE('01/01/1970 00:00', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI') OR (d.startdate=TRUNC(d.startdate, 'MONTH') AND d.startdate = s.disc); EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN pkg_job.fatal_error; RAISE; EN D;

all_metrics.label: DB Time/sec
all_metrics.explanation: Total database work per second. Core workload intensity metric.

all_metrics.label: DB CPU/sec
all_metrics.explanation: CPU consumed by database per second. Increasing means more compute demand.

all_metrics.label: Logical Reads/sec
all_metrics.explanation: Buffer gets per second. High values indicate intensive SQL scanning.

all_metrics.label: Physical Reads/sec
all_metrics.explanation: Disk reads per second. Increase signals cache misses or new full scans.

all_metrics.label: Physical Writes/sec
all_metrics.explanation: Disk writes per second. Increase may indicate more DML or redo/undo activity.

all_metrics.label: Redo Size/sec
all_metrics.explanation: Bytes of redo generated per second. Higher means more DML workload.

all_metrics.label: Hard Parses/sec
all_metrics.explanation: Hard parses per second. >100/s indicates literal SQL or cursor invalidation.

all_metrics.label: Total Parses/sec
all_metrics.explanation: All parses per second. Drives CPU overhead and shared pool pressure.

all_metrics.label: Executes/sec
all_metrics.explanation: SQL executions per second. Application throughput indicator.

all_metrics.label: Transactions/sec
all_metrics.explanation: User commits+rollbacks per second. Primary business throughput KPI.

all_metrics.label: Logons/sec
all_metrics.explanation: New session creations per second. Spike signals connection pool churn.

all_metrics.label: User Calls/sec
all_metrics.explanation: User-originated calls per second. Overall application request rate.

all_metrics.label: Sorts/sec
all_metrics.explanation: Sort operations per second. High PGA usage if disk sorts occur.

all_metrics.label: Block Changes/sec
all_metrics.explanation: Buffer blocks modified per second. Correlates with redo and DML volume.

all_metrics.label: Buffer Cache Hit %
all_metrics.explanation: Data found in RAM vs disk. <95% = excessive physical I/O.

all_metrics.label: Library Cache Hit %
all_metrics.explanation: SQL look-ups that found the cursor in memory. Low = shared pool too small.

all_metrics.label: Soft Parse %
all_metrics.explanation: SQL executions that reused a cached plan. <95% = hard parse storm.

all_metrics.label: Execute to Parse %
all_metrics.explanation: % executes reusing open cursor. Low = cursor caching not enabled.

all_metrics.label: Latch Hit %
all_metrics.explanation: Internal Oracle lock efficiency. <99% = contention in shared memory.

all_metrics.label: DB Time (min)
all_metrics.explanation: Total database active time. Core load indicator.

all_metrics.label: Avg Active Sessions
all_metrics.explanation: Sessions actively working. >CPU count = saturation.

all_metrics.label: Transactions/sec
all_metrics.explanation: Business throughput KPI (commits+rollbacks per second).

all_metrics.label: Elapsed Window
all_metrics.explanation: Observation window length. Large difference = unequal comparison.

all_metrics.label: DB CPU
all_metrics.explanation: Time on CPU ??? actual execution work, not a wait. High CPU can indicate inefficient SQL or increased workload.

all_metrics.label: PX Deq: Slave Session Stats
all_metrics.explanation: Wait event contributing 0.9% of DB time.

all_metrics.label: PX Deq: Join ACK
all_metrics.explanation: Wait event contributing 0.7% of DB time.

all_metrics.label: db file scattered read
all_metrics.explanation: Multi-block read ??? full table or index range scan. db_file_multiblock_read_count blocks per I/O.

banners.title: Standard Snapshot Windows ??? General DB Comparison
banners.message: Both windows follow Oracle's scheduled AWR snap interval (30 min). Good window: 13-Mar-2025 01:00 to 13-Mar-2025 06:30. Bad window: 18-Mar-2025 00:00 to 18-Mar-2025 05:30. These were NOT manually captured for a specific job ??? they contain all concurrent activity across all sessions in that period. Findings reflect total database workload, not an isolated job. Any SQL or wait event under 20% DB Time may represent background activity unrelated to the performance issue being investigated.

banners.title: Extended Window ??? Transient Issues May Be Diluted
banners.message: The bad (problem) window spans 330 minutes. A performance problem lasting 20???30 minutes within this window will appear diluted in aggregate averages. If the actual problem is transient (a job that runs for a subset of the total window), normalized metrics will understate its true peak intensity. The peak AAS and CPU load values are more reliable indicators of impact than window-averaged percentages.

stability.pattern_detail: 100.0% sessions close immediately ??? no connection pooling detected

execute_intelligence.label: STABLE
execute_intelligence.narrative: Each connection is doing less work (exec/logon changed). Check connection pool sizing and application session reuse.

sql_stats.sql_text: DECLARE v_cnt NUMBER; BEGIN EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'ALTER SESSION ENABLE PARALLEL DML'; update /*+PARALLEL (f, 10) append */ scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst f set qty = 0 where not exists (select /*+ parallel (d, 10)*/ 1 from scpomgr.fcstdraft d where type in (1, 4, 8) and d.dmdunit = f.dmdunit and d.dmdgroup = f.dmdgroup and d.loc = f.loc and d.startdate = f.startdate ) and qty <> 0; commit; merge /*+ PARALLEL (d, 10) append */ into SCPOMGR.UDT_STAT_FCST d using (select /*+ PARALLEL (fd, 10) */ fd.DMDUNIT, fd.dmdgroup, fd.loc, startdate, dur, SUM(qty) statfcst from SCPOMGR.FCSTDRAFT fd, SCPOMGR.dfu dv WHERE TYPE IN (1, 4, 8) AND fd.dmdunit = dv.dmdunit AND fd.dmdgroup = dv.dmdgroup AND fd.loc = dv.loc AND fd.model = dv.model AND u_level = 'MAT-Customer-Loc' AND u_manual_fcst = 0 GROUP BY fd.dmdunit, fd.dmdgroup, fd.loc, startdate, dur) s on (s.dmdunit=d.dmdunit and s.dmdgroup=d.dmdgroup and s.loc=d.loc and s.startdate=d.startdate) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET d.qty = s.statfcst WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT /*+ APPEND */ (d.DMDUNIT, d.DMDGROUP, d.LOC , d.STARTDATE, d.dur, d.qty, d.SLSFCST) VALUES (s.DMDUNIT, s.DMDGROUP, s.LOC, s.STARTDATE, s.dur, s.statfcst, s.Statfcst); v_cnt := SQL%ROWCOUNT; COMMIT; pkg_log.metric ('No of rows copied into UDT_STAT_FCST are :', v_cnt); scpomgr.pkg_ddl.truncate_table ('UDT_FCSTADJ'); pkg_log.info ('UDT_FCSTADJ Table truncated'); insert /*+ append */ into scpomgr.udt_fcstadj (DMDUNIT, DMDGROUP, LOC, QTYTYPE_6, QTYTYPE_5, QTYTYPE_2, STARTDATE) (select /*+ parallel */ s.DMDUNIT, s.DMDGROUP, s.LOC, s.SLSFCST-s.QTY , s.REGFCST-s.SLSFCST , s.FINALFCST-s.REGFCST, s.STARTDATE from scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst s where startdate>=trunc(sysdate, 'MM')) ; v_cnt := SQL%ROWCOUNT; commit; pkg_log.metric ('No of rows co pied into udt_fcstadj are :', v_cnt); scpomgr.PROC_FORECAST_ADJUSTMENT(); EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'ALTER SESSION DISABLE PARALLEL DML'; EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN pkg_job.fatal_error; RAISE; END;

sql_stats.sql_text: DECLARE v_cnt NUMBER; BEGIN scpomgr.pkg_ddl.truncate_table ('UDT_STAT_FCST_BKP'); INSERT /*+ APPEND */ INTO scpomgr.UDT_STAT_FCST_BKP select /*+ PARALLEL */ dmdunit, dmdgroup, loc, u_level, startdate, dur, qty, slsfcst, regfcst, finalfcst, manualfcst from scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst; scpomgr.pkg_ddl.truncate_table ('UDT_STAT_FCST'); EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'ALTER SESSION ENABLE PARALLEL DML'; INSERT /*+ APPEND */ INTO scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst (dmdunit, dmdgroup, loc, startdate, dur, u_level, qty) SELECT /*+ PARALLEL */ f.dmdunit, f.dmdgroup, f.loc, f.startdate, f.dur , d.u_level, SUM (f.qty) qty FROM scpomgr.fcstdraft f, (SELECT dmdunit, dmdgroup, loc, u_level FROM scpomgr.dfuview WHERE u_generate_statfcst in (1, 2) and u_level = 'MAT-Customer-Loc') d WHERE d.dmdunit = f.dmdunit AND d.dmdgroup = f.dmdgroup AND d.loc = f.loc AND f.TYPE IN (1, 4, 8) GROUP BY f.dmdunit, f.dmdgroup, f.loc, f.startdate, f.dur, d.u_level; v_cnt := SQL%ROWCOUNT; COMMIT; pkg_log.metric ('No of Statisticsl Fcst records copied are:', v_cnt); scpomgr.pkg_ddl.gather_table_stats ('UDT_STAT_FCST', 8); DELETE /*+ PARALLEL */ FROM SCPOMGR.FCSTDRAFT f WHERE EXISTS (SELECT /*+ PARALLEL */ 1 FROM S CPOMGR.DFUVIEW d WHERE f.dmdunit = d.dmdunit AND f.dmdgroup = d.dmdgroup AND f.loc = d.loc AND d.u_generate_statfcst in (0, 2)); v_cnt := SQL%ROWCOUNT; COMMIT; pkg_log.metric ( 'Deleted Stat Fcst reference records from FCSTDRAFT:', v_cnt); scpomgr.pkg_ddl.gather_table_stats ('FCSTDRAFT', 8); EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'ALTER SESSION DISABLE PARALLEL DML'; merge into scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst d using (select dmdunit, dmdgroup, loc, u_level, startdate, dur, qty, slsfcst, regfcst, finalfcst, manualfcst from scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst_bkp) s on (s.dmdunit=d.dmdunit and s.dmdgroup=d.dmdgroup and s.loc=d.loc and s.startdate=d.startdate) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET d.slsfcst=s.slsfcst, d.regfcst=s.regfcst, d.finalfcst=s.finalfcst, d.manualfcst=s.manualfcst WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT /*+ APPEND */ ( d.dmdunit, d.dmdgroup, d.loc, d.startdate, d.slsfcst, d.regfcst, d.finalfcst, d.u_level, d.dur, d.qty, d.manualfcst ) values ( s.dmdunit, s.dmdgroup, s.loc, s.startdate, s.slsfcst, s.regfcst, s.finalfcst, s.u_level, s.dur, 0, s.manualfcst ); merge into scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst d using (select dmdunit, dmdgroup, loc, disc from scpomgr.DFU) s on (s.dmdunit=d.dmdunit and s.dmdgroup=d.dmdgroup and s.loc=d.loc) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET d.slsfcst=0, d.regfcst=0, d.finalfcst=0, d.manualfcst=-0.001 where d.startdate > s.disc and disc <> TO_DATE('01/01/1970 00:00', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI') OR (d.startdate=TRUNC(d.startdate, 'MONTH') AND d.startdate = s.disc); EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN pkg_job.fatal_error; RAISE; EN D;

20vgcftpfakdf.fullText: insert /*+ APPEND */ into scpomgr.dfumap(map, todmdunit, todmdgroup, todfuloc, fromdmdunit, fromdmdgroup, fromdfuloc, frommodel, tomodel, eff, disc) SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(8) */ * FROM ( select /*+ paralell(d2, 8) parallel(d1, 8) index_ffs(d2 indx_dfu_lvl) index_ffs(dmdgroup INDX_DMDGROUP_LVL) index_ffs(loc indx_loc_lvl) INDEX(D1 INDX_DFU_LEVEL) INDEX(D2 INDX_DFU_LEVEL) */ DISTINCT 'KIWE_112_122_434' MAP, DMDUNIT.U_LEVEL4 TODMDUNIT, DMDGROUP.U_KISOLDTO_REGION TODMDGROUP, LOC.U_ALL TODFULOC, DMDUNIT.DMDUNIT FROMDMDUNIT, DMDGROUP.U_COUNTRY FROMDMDGROUP, LOC.U_COUNTRY FROMDFULOC, D2.MODEL TOMODEL, D1.MODEL FROMMODEL, D2.EFF, D2.DISC from SCPOMGR.DMDUNIT , SCPOMGR.DMDGROUP, SCPOMGR.LOC, SCPOMGR.DFU D1, SCPOMGR.DFU D2 where DMDUNIT.U_MKT_ACT='112' AND DMDGROUP.U_KISOLDTO_REGION='KIWE' AND D1.DMDUNIT = DMDUNIT.U_LEVEL4 AND D1.DMDGROUP = DMDGROUP.U_KISOLDTO_RE GION AND D1.LOC = LOC.U_ALL AND D2.DMDUNIT = DMDUNIT.DMDUNIT AND D2.DMDGROUP = DMDGROUP.U_COUNTRY AND D2.LOC = LOC.U_COUNTRY AND D2.U_LEVEL = 'MAT-Country-Country' AND D1.U_LEVEL = 'MAG_SEG-Region-ALL') iv WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(8) */ 1 FROM SCPOMGR.DFUMAP WHERE DFUMAP.TODMDUNIT=iv.TODMDUNIT and DFUMAP.TODMDGROUP=iv.TODMDGROUP and DFUMAP.TODFULOC=iv.TODFULOC and DFUMAP.TOMODEL=iv.TOMODEL AND DFUMAP.FROMDMDUNIT=iv.FROMDMDUNIT and DFUMAP.FROMDMDGROUP=iv.FROMDMDGROUP and DFUMAP.FROMDFULOC=iv.FROMDFULOC and DFUMAP.FROMMODEL=iv.FROMMODEL )

277p28spmz5jk.fullText: DECLARE v_cnt NUMBER; BEGIN scpomgr.pkg_ddl.truncate_table ('UDT_STAT_FCST_BKP'); INSERT /*+ APPEND */ INTO scpomgr.UDT_STAT_FCST_BKP select /*+ PARALLEL */ dmdunit, dmdgroup, loc, u_level, startdate, dur, qty, slsfcst, regfcst, finalfcst, manualfcst from scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst; scpomgr.pkg_ddl.truncate_table ('UDT_STAT_FCST'); EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'ALTER SESSION ENABLE PARALLEL DML'; INSERT /*+ APPEND */ INTO scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst (dmdunit, dmdgroup, loc, startdate, dur, u_level, qty) SELECT /*+ PARALLEL */ f.dmdunit, f.dmdgroup, f.loc, f.startdate, f.dur , d.u_level, SUM (f.qty) qty FROM scpomgr.fcstdraft f, (SELECT dmdunit, dmdgroup, loc, u_level FROM scpomgr.dfuview WHERE u_generate_statfcst in (1, 2) and u_level = 'MAT-Customer-Loc') d WHERE d.dmdunit = f.dmdunit AND d.dmdgroup = f.dmdgroup AND d.loc = f.loc AND f.TYPE IN (1, 4, 8) GROUP BY f.dmdunit, f.dmdgroup, f.loc, f.startdate, f.dur, d.u_level; v_cnt := SQL%ROWCOUNT; COMMIT; pkg_log.metric ('No of Statisticsl Fcst records copied are:', v_cnt); scpomgr.pkg_ddl.gather_table_stats ('UDT_STAT_FCST', 8); DELETE /*+ PARALLEL */ FROM SCPOMGR.FCSTDRAFT f WHERE EXISTS (SELECT /*+ PARALLEL */ 1 FROM S CPOMGR.DFUVIEW d WHERE f.dmdunit = d.dmdunit AND f.dmdgroup = d.dmdgroup AND f.loc = d.loc AND d.u_generate_statfcst in (0, 2)); v_cnt := SQL%ROWCOUNT; COMMIT; pkg_log.metric ( 'Deleted Stat Fcst reference records from FCSTDRAFT:', v_cnt); scpomgr.pkg_ddl.gather_table_stats ('FCSTDRAFT', 8); EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'ALTER SESSION DISABLE PARALLEL DML'; merge into scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst d using (select dmdunit, dmdgroup, loc, u_level, startdate, dur, qty, slsfcst, regfcst, finalfcst, manualfcst from scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst_bkp) s on (s.dmdunit=d.dmdunit and s.dmdgroup=d.dmdgroup and s.loc=d.loc and s.startdate=d.startdate) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET d.slsfcst=s.slsfcst, d.regfcst=s.regfcst, d.finalfcst=s.finalfcst, d.manualfcst=s.manualfcst WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT /*+ APPEND */ ( d.dmdunit, d.dmdgroup, d.loc, d.startdate, d.slsfcst, d.regfcst, d.finalfcst, d.u_level, d.dur, d.qty, d.manualfcst ) values ( s.dmdunit, s.dmdgroup, s.loc, s.startdate, s.slsfcst, s.regfcst, s.finalfcst, s.u_level, s.dur, 0, s.manualfcst ); merge into scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst d using (select dmdunit, dmdgroup, loc, disc from scpomgr.DFU) s on (s.dmdunit=d.dmdunit and s.dmdgroup=d.dmdgroup and s.loc=d.loc) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET d.slsfcst=0, d.regfcst=0, d.finalfcst=0, d.manualfcst=-0.001 where d.startdate > s.disc and disc <> TO_DATE('01/01/1970 00:00', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI') OR (d.startdate=TRUNC(d.startdate, 'MONTH') AND d.startdate = s.disc); EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN pkg_job.fatal_error; RAISE; EN D;

5fsbnpg09nq5p.fullText: DECLARE v_cnt NUMBER; BEGIN EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'ALTER SESSION ENABLE PARALLEL DML'; update /*+PARALLEL (f, 10) append */ scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst f set qty = 0 where not exists (select /*+ parallel (d, 10)*/ 1 from scpomgr.fcstdraft d where type in (1, 4, 8) and d.dmdunit = f.dmdunit and d.dmdgroup = f.dmdgroup and d.loc = f.loc and d.startdate = f.startdate ) and qty <> 0; commit; merge /*+ PARALLEL (d, 10) append */ into SCPOMGR.UDT_STAT_FCST d using (select /*+ PARALLEL (fd, 10) */ fd.DMDUNIT, fd.dmdgroup, fd.loc, startdate, dur, SUM(qty) statfcst from SCPOMGR.FCSTDRAFT fd, SCPOMGR.dfu dv WHERE TYPE IN (1, 4, 8) AND fd.dmdunit = dv.dmdunit AND fd.dmdgroup = dv.dmdgroup AND fd.loc = dv.loc AND fd.model = dv.model AND u_level = 'MAT-Customer-Loc' AND u_manual_fcst = 0 GROUP BY fd.dmdunit, fd.dmdgroup, fd.loc, startdate, dur) s on (s.dmdunit=d.dmdunit and s.dmdgroup=d.dmdgroup and s.loc=d.loc and s.startdate=d.startdate) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET d.qty = s.statfcst WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT /*+ APPEND */ (d.DMDUNIT, d.DMDGROUP, d.LOC , d.STARTDATE, d.dur, d.qty, d.SLSFCST) VALUES (s.DMDUNIT, s.DMDGROUP, s.LOC, s.STARTDATE, s.dur, s.statfcst, s.Statfcst); v_cnt := SQL%ROWCOUNT; COMMIT; pkg_log.metric ('No of rows copied into UDT_STAT_FCST are :', v_cnt); scpomgr.pkg_ddl.truncate_table ('UDT_FCSTADJ'); pkg_log.info ('UDT_FCSTADJ Table truncated'); insert /*+ append */ into scpomgr.udt_fcstadj (DMDUNIT, DMDGROUP, LOC, QTYTYPE_6, QTYTYPE_5, QTYTYPE_2, STARTDATE) (select /*+ parallel */ s.DMDUNIT, s.DMDGROUP, s.LOC, s.SLSFCST-s.QTY , s.REGFCST-s.SLSFCST , s.FINALFCST-s.REGFCST, s.STARTDATE from scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst s where startdate>=trunc(sysdate, 'MM')) ; v_cnt := SQL%ROWCOUNT; commit; pkg_log.metric ('No of rows co pied into udt_fcstadj are :', v_cnt); scpomgr.PROC_FORECAST_ADJUSTMENT(); EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'ALTER SESSION DISABLE PARALLEL DML'; EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN pkg_job.fatal_error; RAISE; END;

_sql_text_map.20vgcftpfakdf: insert /*+ APPEND */ into scpomgr.dfumap(map, todmdunit, todmdgroup, todfuloc, fromdmdunit, fromdmdgroup, fromdfuloc, frommodel, tomodel, eff, disc) SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(8) */ * FROM ( select /*+ paralell(d2, 8) parallel(d1, 8) index_ffs(d2 indx_dfu_lvl) index_ffs(dmdgroup INDX_DMDGROUP_LVL) index_ffs(loc indx_loc_lvl) INDEX(D1 INDX_DFU_LEVEL) INDEX(D2 INDX_DFU_LEVEL) */ DISTINCT 'KIWE_112_122_434' MAP, DMDUNIT.U_LEVEL4 TODMDUNIT, DMDGROUP.U_KISOLDTO_REGION TODMDGROUP, LOC.U_ALL TODFULOC, DMDUNIT.DMDUNIT FROMDMDUNIT, DMDGROUP.U_COUNTRY FROMDMDGROUP, LOC.U_COUNTRY FROMDFULOC, D2.MODEL TOMODEL, D1.MODEL FROMMODEL, D2.EFF, D2.DISC from SCPOMGR.DMDUNIT , SCPOMGR.DMDGROUP, SCPOMGR.LOC, SCPOMGR.DFU D1, SCPOMGR.DFU D2 where DMDUNIT.U_MKT_ACT='112' AND DMDGROUP.U_KISOLDTO_REGION='KIWE' AND D1.DMDUNIT = DMDUNIT.U_LEVEL4 AND D1.DMDGROUP = DMDGROUP.U_KISOLDTO_RE GION AND D1.LOC = LOC.U_ALL AND D2.DMDUNIT = DMDUNIT.DMDUNIT AND D2.DMDGROUP = DMDGROUP.U_COUNTRY AND D2.LOC = LOC.U_COUNTRY AND D2.U_LEVEL = 'MAT-Country-Country' AND D1.U_LEVEL = 'MAG_SEG-Region-ALL') iv WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(8) */ 1 FROM SCPOMGR.DFUMAP WHERE DFUMAP.TODMDUNIT=iv.TODMDUNIT and DFUMAP.TODMDGROUP=iv.TODMDGROUP and DFUMAP.TODFULOC=iv.TODFULOC and DFUMAP.TOMODEL=iv.TOMODEL AND DFUMAP.FROMDMDUNIT=iv.FROMDMDUNIT and DFUMAP.FROMDMDGROUP=iv.FROMDMDGROUP and DFUMAP.FROMDFULOC=iv.FROMDFULOC and DFUMAP.FROMMODEL=iv.FROMMODEL )
_sql_text_map.277p28spmz5jk: DECLARE v_cnt NUMBER; BEGIN scpomgr.pkg_ddl.truncate_table ('UDT_STAT_FCST_BKP'); INSERT /*+ APPEND */ INTO scpomgr.UDT_STAT_FCST_BKP select /*+ PARALLEL */ dmdunit, dmdgroup, loc, u_level, startdate, dur, qty, slsfcst, regfcst, finalfcst, manualfcst from scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst; scpomgr.pkg_ddl.truncate_table ('UDT_STAT_FCST'); EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'ALTER SESSION ENABLE PARALLEL DML'; INSERT /*+ APPEND */ INTO scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst (dmdunit, dmdgroup, loc, startdate, dur, u_level, qty) SELECT /*+ PARALLEL */ f.dmdunit, f.dmdgroup, f.loc, f.startdate, f.dur , d.u_level, SUM (f.qty) qty FROM scpomgr.fcstdraft f, (SELECT dmdunit, dmdgroup, loc, u_level FROM scpomgr.dfuview WHERE u_generate_statfcst in (1, 2) and u_level = 'MAT-Customer-Loc') d WHERE d.dmdunit = f.dmdunit AND d.dmdgroup = f.dmdgroup AND d.loc = f.loc AND f.TYPE IN (1, 4, 8) GROUP BY f.dmdunit, f.dmdgroup, f.loc, f.startdate, f.dur, d.u_level; v_cnt := SQL%ROWCOUNT; COMMIT; pkg_log.metric ('No of Statisticsl Fcst records copied are:', v_cnt); scpomgr.pkg_ddl.gather_table_stats ('UDT_STAT_FCST', 8); DELETE /*+ PARALLEL */ FROM SCPOMGR.FCSTDRAFT f WHERE EXISTS (SELECT /*+ PARALLEL */ 1 FROM S CPOMGR.DFUVIEW d WHERE f.dmdunit = d.dmdunit AND f.dmdgroup = d.dmdgroup AND f.loc = d.loc AND d.u_generate_statfcst in (0, 2)); v_cnt := SQL%ROWCOUNT; COMMIT; pkg_log.metric ( 'Deleted Stat Fcst reference records from FCSTDRAFT:', v_cnt); scpomgr.pkg_ddl.gather_table_stats ('FCSTDRAFT', 8); EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'ALTER SESSION DISABLE PARALLEL DML'; merge into scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst d using (select dmdunit, dmdgroup, loc, u_level, startdate, dur, qty, slsfcst, regfcst, finalfcst, manualfcst from scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst_bkp) s on (s.dmdunit=d.dmdunit and s.dmdgroup=d.dmdgroup and s.loc=d.loc and s.startdate=d.startdate) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET d.slsfcst=s.slsfcst, d.regfcst=s.regfcst, d.finalfcst=s.finalfcst, d.manualfcst=s.manualfcst WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT /*+ APPEND */ ( d.dmdunit, d.dmdgroup, d.loc, d.startdate, d.slsfcst, d.regfcst, d.finalfcst, d.u_level, d.dur, d.qty, d.manualfcst ) values ( s.dmdunit, s.dmdgroup, s.loc, s.startdate, s.slsfcst, s.regfcst, s.finalfcst, s.u_level, s.dur, 0, s.manualfcst ); merge into scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst d using (select dmdunit, dmdgroup, loc, disc from scpomgr.DFU) s on (s.dmdunit=d.dmdunit and s.dmdgroup=d.dmdgroup and s.loc=d.loc) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET d.slsfcst=0, d.regfcst=0, d.finalfcst=0, d.manualfcst=-0.001 where d.startdate > s.disc and disc <> TO_DATE('01/01/1970 00:00', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI') OR (d.startdate=TRUNC(d.startdate, 'MONTH') AND d.startdate = s.disc); EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN pkg_job.fatal_error; RAISE; EN D;
_sql_text_map.2h9nuaa3x0kkd: INSERT /*+ APPEND */ INTO SCPOMGR.UDT_STAT_FCST (DMDUNIT, DMDGROUP, LOC, STARTDATE, DUR, U_LEVEL, QTY) SELECT /*+ PARALLEL */ F.DMDUNIT, F.DMDGROUP, F.LOC, F.STARTDATE, F.DUR, D.U_LEVEL, SUM (F.QTY) QTY FROM SCPOMGR.FCSTDRAFT F, (SELECT DMDUNIT, DMDGROUP, LOC, U_LEVEL FROM SCPOMGR.DFUVIEW WHERE U_GENERATE_STATFCST IN (1, 2) AND U_LEVEL = 'MAT-Customer-Loc') D WHERE D.DMDUNIT = F.DMDUNIT AND D.DMDGROUP = F.DMDGROUP AND D.LOC = F.LOC AND F.TYPE IN (1, 4, 8) GROUP BY F.DMDUNIT, F.DMDGROUP, F.LOC, F.STARTDATE, F.DUR, D.U_LEVEL
_sql_text_map.2zgprbgksx178: DELETE /*+ PARALLEL(f, 16) INDEX_FFS(f IDX_FCSTDRAFT) */ FROM SCPOMGR.FCSTDRAFT F WHERE TYPE = 4
_sql_text_map.3p2rucp9gjck7: MERGE /*+ APPEND*/ INTO SCPOMGR.UDT_CONSENSUS_RPT_TMP UCR USING SCPOMGR.UDT_PREV_FINAL_FCST A ON (UCR.DMDUNIT = A.DMDUNIT AND UCR.DMDGROUP = A.DMDGROUP AND UCR.LOC = A.LOC AND UCR.STARTDATE = A.STARTDATE) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET UCR.TOTFCST1 = A.QTY, UCR.TOTFCST2 = A.TOTFCST2, UCR.TOTFCST3 = A.TOTFCST3, UCR.TOTFCST4 = A.TOTFCST4, UCR.TOTFCST5 = A.TOTFCST5, UCR.TOTFCST6 = A.TOTFCST6, UCR.TOTFCST7 = A.TOTFCST7

_sql_text_map.4qguf81v4r5mx: UPDATE SRE_NODE SET LOCKERS_NODE_ID = :B4 , STOP_REQUEST_DATE = SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP), NODE_STATE = :B3 WHERE NODE_STATE = :B2 AND ROWNUM = 1 AND SRE_NODE.CURRENT_JOB_ID = :B1 RETURNING NODE_ID INTO :O0
_sql_text_map.4z4wjugdy607t: DECLARE v_cnt NUMBER; BEGIN pkg_log.info ('------------------------------------------------'); pkg_log.info ('JOB STARTED'); pkg_log.info ('-------------------------------------------------'); EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'ALTER SESSION ENABLE PARALLEL DML'; pkg_log.info ('Delete previous run Reconcile Forecast data' ); DELETE /*+ PARALLEL(f, 16) INDEX_FFS(f IDX_FCSTDRAFT) */ FROM scpomgr.fcstdraft f WHERE TYPE = 4; v_cnt := SQL%ROWCOUNT; COMMIT; pkg_log.info ('Total Reconcile Forecast records deleted:' || v_cnt); pkg_job.add_volume (v_cnt); EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'ALTER SESSION DISABLE PARALLEL DML'; EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN pkg_job.fatal_error; RAISE; END;
_sql_text_map.51d3xxxk13mgb: DELETE /*+ PARALLEL */ FROM SCPOMGR.FCSTDRAFT F WHERE EXISTS (SELECT /*+ PARALLEL */ 1 FROM SCPOMGR.DFUVIEW D WHERE F.DMDUNIT = D.DMDUNIT AND F.DMDGROUP = D.DMDGROUP AND F.LOC = D.LOC AND D.U_GENERATE_STATFCST IN (0, 2))
_sql_text_map.5az5ph1341gzf: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SRE_GLOBAL_PROPERTY WHERE NAME = :B2 AND ((VALUE IS NULL) OR ((SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) - TO_TIMESTAMP(VALUE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISSFF')) > :B1 ) OR ((TO_TIMESTAMP(VALUE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISSFF') - SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP)) > :B1 ) )
_sql_text_map.5dqz0hqtp9fru: select /*+ connect_by_filtering index(sysauth$ i_sysauth1) */ privilege#, bitand(nvl(option$, 0), 72), grantee#, level from sysauth$ connect by grantee#=prior privilege# and privilege#>0 start with grantee#=:1 and privilege#>0
_sql_text_map.5dxjxn972ppwp: SELECT NODE_STATE FROM SRE_NODE WHERE NODE_ID = :B1
_sql_text_map.5fsbnpg09nq5p: DECLARE v_cnt NUMBER; BEGIN EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'ALTER SESSION ENABLE PARALLEL DML'; update /*+PARALLEL (f, 10) append */ scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst f set qty = 0 where not exists (select /*+ parallel (d, 10)*/ 1 from scpomgr.fcstdraft d where type in (1, 4, 8) and d.dmdunit = f.dmdunit and d.dmdgroup = f.dmdgroup and d.loc = f.loc and d.startdate = f.startdate ) and qty <> 0; commit; merge /*+ PARALLEL (d, 10) append */ into SCPOMGR.UDT_STAT_FCST d using (select /*+ PARALLEL (fd, 10) */ fd.DMDUNIT, fd.dmdgroup, fd.loc, startdate, dur, SUM(qty) statfcst from SCPOMGR.FCSTDRAFT fd, SCPOMGR.dfu dv WHERE TYPE IN (1, 4, 8) AND fd.dmdunit = dv.dmdunit AND fd.dmdgroup = dv.dmdgroup AND fd.loc = dv.loc AND fd.model = dv.model AND u_level = 'MAT-Customer-Loc' AND u_manual_fcst = 0 GROUP BY fd.dmdunit, fd.dmdgroup, fd.loc, startdate, dur) s on (s.dmdunit=d.dmdunit and s.dmdgroup=d.dmdgroup and s.loc=d.loc and s.startdate=d.startdate) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET d.qty = s.statfcst WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT /*+ APPEND */ (d.DMDUNIT, d.DMDGROUP, d.LOC , d.STARTDATE, d.dur, d.qty, d.SLSFCST) VALUES (s.DMDUNIT, s.DMDGROUP, s.LOC, s.STARTDATE, s.dur, s.statfcst, s.Statfcst); v_cnt := SQL%ROWCOUNT; COMMIT; pkg_log.metric ('No of rows copied into UDT_STAT_FCST are :', v_cnt); scpomgr.pkg_ddl.truncate_table ('UDT_FCSTADJ'); pkg_log.info ('UDT_FCSTADJ Table truncated'); insert /*+ append */ into scpomgr.udt_fcstadj (DMDUNIT, DMDGROUP, LOC, QTYTYPE_6, QTYTYPE_5, QTYTYPE_2, STARTDATE) (select /*+ parallel */ s.DMDUNIT, s.DMDGROUP, s.LOC, s.SLSFCST-s.QTY , s.REGFCST-s.SLSFCST , s.FINALFCST-s.REGFCST, s.STARTDATE from scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst s where startdate>=trunc(sysdate, 'MM')) ; v_cnt := SQL%ROWCOUNT; commit; pkg_log.metric ('No of rows co pied into udt_fcstadj are :', v_cnt); scpomgr.PROC_FORECAST_ADJUSTMENT(); EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'ALTER SESSION DISABLE PARALLEL DML'; EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN pkg_job.fatal_error; RAISE; END;
_sql_text_map.5uvns4qk0vu5w: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SRE_NODE WHERE SRE_NODE.NODE_STATE <> :B3 AND SRE_NODE.NODE_STATE <> :B2 AND SRE_NODE.CURRENT_JOB_ID = :B1

_sql_text_map.6kb0d66hv9230: SELECT NUMTODSINTERVAL(DECODE(COUNT(NODE_ID), 1, MIN(BUILD_ACTIONS_TIMEOUT), 0), 'SECOND') FROM SRE_NODE, SRE_JOB, SRE_NODE_CONFIG WHERE NODE_ID = :B1 AND SRE_JOB.JOB_ID = SRE_NODE.CURRENT_JOB_ID AND SRE_NODE_CONFIG.NODE_CONFIG_NAME = SRE_JOB.NODE_CONFIG_NAME AND SRE_NODE_CONFIG.SERVICE_NAME = SRE_JOB.SERVICE_NAME AND SRE_JOB.JOB_STATE IN (:B5 , :B4 , :B3 , :B2 ) AND SRE_JOB.LOCKERS_NODE_ID <> :B1

_sql_text_map.75rsn1tdhkmjs: MERGE INTO SCPOMGR.UDT_STAT_FCST D USING (SELECT DMDUNIT, DMDGROUP, LOC, U_LEVEL, STARTDATE, DUR, QTY, SLSFCST, REGFCST, FINALFCST, MANUALFCST FROM SCPOMGR.UDT_STAT_FCST_BKP) S ON (S.DMDUNIT=D.DMDUNIT AND S.DMDGROUP=D.DMDGROUP AND S.LOC=D.LOC AND S.STARTDATE=D.STARTDATE) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET D.SLSFCST=S.SLSFCST, D.REGFCST=S.REGFCST, D.FINALFCST=S.FINALFCST, D.MANUALFCST=S.MANUALFCST WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT /*+ APPEND */ ( D.DMDUNIT, D.DMDGROUP, D.LOC, D.STARTDATE, D.SLSFCST, D.REGFCST, D.FINALFCST, D.U_LEVEL, D.DUR, D.QTY, D.MANUALFCST ) VALUES ( S.DMDUNIT, S.DMDGROUP, S.LOC, S.STARTDATE, S.SLSFCST, S.REGFCST, S.FINALFCST, S.U_LEVEL, S.DUR, 0, S.MANUALFCST )

_sql_text_map.7ax1rw9w3p05u: DELETE /*+ PARALLEL */ FROM SCPOMGR.FCSTDRAFT FD WHERE EXISTS (SELECT /*+ PARALLEL */ 1 FROM SCPOMGR.DFU D WHERE D.DMDUNIT = FD.DMDUNIT AND D.DMDGROUP = FD.DMDGROUP AND D.LOC = FD.LOC AND D.MODEL = FD.MODEL AND TRUNC (FD.STARTDATE) > TRUNC (D.DISC) AND TRUNC (D.DISC) <> TO_DATE ('01-JAN-70', 'DD-MON-RR'))
_sql_text_map.7frwh5dfd11dz: insert /*+ APPEND */ into scpomgr.dfumap(map, todmdunit, todmdgroup, todfuloc, fromdmdunit, fromdmdgroup, fromdfuloc, frommodel, tomodel, eff, disc) SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(8) */ * FROM ( select /*+ paralell(d2, 8) parallel(d1, 8) index_ffs(d2 indx_dfu_lvl) index_ffs(dmdgroup INDX_DMDGROUP_LVL) index_ffs(loc indx_loc_lvl) INDEX(D1 INDX_DFU_LEVEL) INDEX(D2 INDX_DFU_LEVEL) */ DISTINCT 'KIAM_110_122_534' MAP, DMDUNIT.U_LEVEL5 TODMDUNIT, DMDGROUP.U_KISOLDTO_REGION TODMDGROUP, LOC.U_ALL TODFULOC, DMDUNIT.DMDUNIT FROMDMDUNIT, DMDGROUP.U_COUNTRY FROMDMDGROUP, LOC.U_COUNTRY FROMDFULOC, D2.MODEL TOMODEL, D1.MODEL FROMMODEL, D2.EFF, D2.DISC from SCPOMGR.DMDUNIT , SCPOMGR.DMDGROUP, SCPOMGR.LOC, SCPOMGR.DFU D1, SCPOMGR.DFU D2 where DMDUNIT.U_MKT_ACT='110' AND DMDGROUP.U_KISOLDTO_REGION='KIAM' AND D1.DMDUNIT = DMDUNIT.U_LEVEL5 AND D1.DMDGROUP = DMDGROUP.U_KISOLDTO_REGI ON AND D1.LOC = LOC.U_ALL AND D2.DMDUNIT = DMDUNIT.DMDUNIT AND D2.DMDGROUP = DMDGROUP.U_COUNTRY AND D2.LOC = LOC.U_COUNTRY AND D2.U_LEVEL = 'MAT-Country-Country' AND D1.U_LEVEL = 'MA-Region-ALL') iv WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(8) */ 1 FROM SCPOMGR.DFUMAP WHERE DFUMAP.TODMDUNIT=iv.TODMDUNIT and DFUMAP.TODMDGROUP=iv.TODMDGROUP and DFUMAP.TODFULOC=iv.TODFULOC and DFUMAP.TOMODEL=iv.TOMODEL AND DFUMAP.FROMDMDUNIT=iv.FROMDMDUNIT and DFUMAP.FROMDMDGROUP=iv.FROMDMDGROUP and DFUMAP.FROMDFULOC=iv.FROMDFULOC and DFUMAP.FROMMODEL=iv.FROMMODEL )

_sql_text_map.fs65f1trnn5gp: UPDATE /*+PARALLEL (f, 10) append */ SCPOMGR.UDT_STAT_FCST F SET QTY = 0 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT /*+ parallel (d, 10)*/ 1 FROM SCPOMGR.FCSTDRAFT D WHERE TYPE IN (1, 4, 8) AND D.DMDUNIT = F.DMDUNIT AND D.DMDGROUP = F.DMDGROUP AND D.LOC = F.LOC AND D.STARTDATE = F.STARTDATE ) AND QTY <> 0
_sql_text_map.ftzxbzrg3xzbr: MERGE /*+ PARALLEL (d, 10) append */ INTO SCPOMGR.UDT_STAT_FCST D USING (SELECT /*+ PARALLEL (fd, 10) */ FD.DMDUNIT, FD.DMDGROUP, FD.LOC, STARTDATE, DUR, SUM(QTY) STATFCST FROM SCPOMGR.FCSTDRAFT FD, SCPOMGR.DFU DV WHERE TYPE IN (1, 4, 8) AND FD.DMDUNIT = DV.DMDUNIT AND FD.DMDGROUP = DV.DMDGROUP AND FD.LOC = DV.LOC AND FD.MODEL = DV.MODEL AND U_LEVEL = 'MAT-Customer-Loc' AND U_MANUAL_FCST = 0 GROUP BY FD.DMDUNIT, FD.DMDGROUP, FD.LOC, STARTDATE, DUR) S ON (S.DMDUNIT=D.DMDUNIT AND S.DMDGROUP=D.DMDGROUP AND S.LOC=D.LOC AND S.STARTDATE=D.STARTDATE) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET D.QTY = S.STATFCST WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT /*+ APPEND */ (D.DMDUNIT, D.DMDGROUP, D.LOC , D.STARTDATE, D.DUR, D.QTY, D.SLSFCST) VALUES (S.DMDUNIT, S.DMDGROUP, S.LOC, S.STARTDATE, S.DUR, S.STATFCST, S.STATFCST)

sql_stats.sql_text: SELECT /*+ parallel 8 */ /* BOMSelectQueryLiveHint */ BOM.BOMNUM, BOM.ITEM, BOM.LOC, BOM.SUBORD, BOM.EFF, BOM.DRAWQTY, BOM.YIELDFACTOR, BOM.DISC, BOM.OFFSET, BOM.MIXFACTOR, BOM.SHRINKAGEFACTOR, BOM.DRAWTYPE, BOM.YIELDCAL, '1' AS ORIGINAL, 1 AS PRIORITY, '' AS ALTSUBORD, BOM.SUBORDLOC, BOM.CONSUMSTEPNUM, BOM.BOMGROUP FROM BOM WHERE ( (BOM.ITEM, BOM.LOC) IN (SELECT ITEM, LOC FROM SKU WHERE MPBATCHNUM = :1 AND REPLENTYPE IN (4, 5) ) OR (SUBORD, BOM.LOC) IN (SELECT ITEM, LOC FROM SKU WHERE MPBATCHNUM = :2 AND REPLENTYPE IN (4, 5) ) OR (SUBORD, BOM.SUBORDLOC) IN (SELECT ITEM, LOC FROM SKU WHERE MPBATCHNUM = :3 AND REPLENTYPE IN (4, 5) ) )UNION ALL SELECT ALTBOM.BOMNUM, ALTBOM.ITEM, ALTBOM.LOC, ALTBOM.SUBORD SUBORD, ALTBOM.ALTSUBORDEFF EFF, ALTBOM.DRAWQTY, ALTBOM.YIELDFACTOR, ALTBOM.ALTSUBORDDISC DISC, ALTBOM.OFFSET, 0 AS MIXFACTOR, 0 AS SHRINKAGEFACTOR, 0 AS DRAWTYPE, ALTBOM.YIELDCAL, '0' AS ORIGINAL, ALTBOM.PRIORITY, ALTBOM.ALTSUBORD, ALTBOM.ALTSUBORDLOC, 0 AS CONSUMSTEPNUM, ALTBOM.ALTBOMGROUP BOMGROUP FROM ALTBOM WHERE (ALTBOM.ITEM, ALTBOM.LOC) IN (SELECT ITEM, LOC FROM SKU WHERE MPBATCHNUM = :4 AND REPLENTYPE IN (4, 5) ) AND ((ALTBOM.ALTSUBORD, ALTBOM.LOC) IN (SELECT ITEM, LOC FROM SKU WHERE MPBATCHNUM = :5 AND REPLENTYPE IN (4, 5) ) OR (ALTBOM.ALTSUBORD, ALTBOM.ALTSUBORDLOC) IN (SELECT ITEM, LOC FROM SKU WHERE MPBATCHNUM = :6 AND REPLENTYPE IN (4, 5) )) AND USAGESW='1' ORDER BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 14 DESC

sql_stats.sql_text: DECLARE v_cnt NUMBER; BEGIN EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'ALTER SESSION ENABLE PARALLEL DML'; update /*+PARALLEL (f, 10) append */ scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst f set qty = 0 where not exists (select /*+ parallel (d, 10)*/ 1 from scpomgr.fcstdraft d where type in (1, 4, 8) and d.dmdunit = f.dmdunit and d.dmdgroup = f.dmdgroup and d.loc = f.loc and d.startdate = f.startdate ) and qty <> 0; commit; merge /*+ PARALLEL (d, 10) append */ into SCPOMGR.UDT_STAT_FCST d using (select /*+ PARALLEL (fd, 10) */ fd.DMDUNIT, fd.dmdgroup, fd.loc, startdate, dur, SUM(qty) statfcst from SCPOMGR.FCSTDRAFT fd, SCPOMGR.dfu dv WHERE TYPE IN (1, 4, 8) AND fd.dmdunit = dv.dmdunit AND fd.dmdgroup = dv.dmdgroup AND fd.loc = dv.loc AND fd.model = dv.model AND u_level = 'MAT-Customer-Loc' AND u_manual_fcst = 0 GROUP BY fd.dmdunit, fd.dmdgroup, fd.loc, s tartdate, dur) s on (s.dmdunit=d.dmdunit and s.dmdgroup=d.dmdgroup and s.loc=d.loc and s.startdate=d.startdate) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET d.qty = s.statfcst WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT /*+ APPEND */ (d.DMDUNIT, d.DMDGROUP, d.LOC , d.STARTDATE, d.dur, d.qty, d.SLSFCST) VALUES (s.DMDUNIT, s.DMDGROUP, s.LOC, s.STARTDATE, s.dur, s.statfcst, s.Statfcst); v_cnt := SQL%ROWCOUNT; COMMIT; pkg_log.metric ('No of rows copied into UDT_STAT_FCST are :', v_cnt); scpomgr.pkg_ddl.truncate_table ('UDT_FCSTADJ'); pkg_log.info ('UDT_FCSTADJ Table truncated'); insert /*+ append */ into scpomgr.udt_fcstadj (DMDUNIT, DMDGROUP, LOC, QTYTYPE_6, QTYTYPE_5, QTYTYPE_2, STARTDATE) (select /*+ parallel */ s.DMDUNIT, s.DMDGROUP, s.LOC, s.SLSFCST-s.QTY , s.REGFCST-s.SLSFCST , s.FINALFCST-s.REGFCST, s.STARTDATE from scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst s where startdate>=trunc(sysdate, 'MM')) ; v_cnt := SQL%ROWCOUNT; commit; pkg_log.metric ('No of rows copi ed into udt_fcstadj are :', v_cnt); scpomgr.PROC_FORECAST_ADJUSTMENT(); EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'ALTER SESSION DISABLE PARALLEL DML'; EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN pkg_job.fatal_error; RAISE; END;

sql_stats.sql_text: MERGE /*+ PARALLEL (d, 10) append */ INTO SCPOMGR.UDT_STAT_FCST D USING (SELECT /*+ PARALLEL (fd, 10) */ FD.DMDUNIT, FD.DMDGROUP, FD.LOC, STARTDATE, DUR, SUM(QTY) STATFCST FROM SCPOMGR.FCSTDRAFT FD, SCPOMGR.DFU DV WHERE TYPE IN (1, 4, 8) AND FD.DMDUNIT = DV.DMDUNIT AND FD.DMDGROUP = DV.DMDGROUP AND FD.LOC = DV.LOC AND FD.MODEL = DV.MODEL AND U_LEVEL = 'MAT-Customer-Loc' AND U_MANUAL_FCST = 0 GROUP BY FD.DMDUNIT, FD.DMDGROUP, FD.LOC, STARTDATE, DUR) S ON (S.DMDUNIT=D.DMDUNIT AND S.DMDGROUP=D.DMDGROUP AND S.LOC=D.LOC AND S.STARTDATE=D.STARTDATE) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET D.QTY = S.STATFCST WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT /*+ APPEND */ (D.DMDUNIT, D.DMDGROUP, D.LOC , D.STARTDATE, D.DUR, D.QTY, D.SLSFCST) VALUES (S.DMDUNIT, S.DMDGROUP, S.LOC, S.STARTDATE, S.DUR, S.STATFCST, S.STATFCST)

10y68bpgtbwxm.fullText: insert /*+ APPEND */ into scpomgr.dfumap(map, todmdunit, todmdgroup, todfuloc, fromdmdunit, fromdmdgroup, fromdfuloc, frommodel, tomodel, eff, disc) SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(8) */ * FROM ( select /*+ paralell(d2, 8) parallel(d1, 8) index_ffs(d2 indx_dfu_lvl) index_ffs(dmdgroup INDX_DMDGROUP_LVL) index_ffs(loc indx_loc_lvl) INDEX(D1 INDX_DFU_LEVEL) INDEX(D2 INDX_DFU_LEVEL) */ DISTINCT 'KAD10000-KCS_65000010-KCS' MAP, DMDUNIT.U_LEVEL5 TODMDUNIT, DMDGROUP.U_KISOLDTO_REGION TODMDGROUP, LOC.U_ALL TODFULOC, DMDUNIT.DMDUNIT FROMDMDUNIT, DMDGROUP.U_COUNTRY FROMDMDGROUP, LOC.U_COUNTRY FROMDFULOC, D2.MODEL TOMODEL, D1.MODEL FROMMODEL, D2.EFF, D2.DISC from SCPOMGR.DMDUNIT , SCPOMGR.DMDGROUP, SCPOMGR.LOC, SCPOMGR.DFU D1, SCPOMGR.DFU D2 where DMDUNIT.U_MKT_ACT='KAD10000-KCS' AND DMDGROUP.U_KISOLDTO_REGION='65000010-KCS' AND D1.DMDUNIT = DMDUNIT.U_LEVEL5 AND D1.DMDGROUP = DMDGROUP.U_KISOLDTO_REGION AND D1.LOC = LOC.U_ALL AND D2.DMDUNIT = DMDUNIT.DMDUNIT AND D2.DMDGROUP = DMDGROUP.U_COUNTRY AND D2.LOC = LOC.U_COUNTRY AND D2.U_LEVEL = 'MAT-Country-Country' AND D1.U_LEVEL = 'MA-Region-ALL') iv WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(8) */ 1 FROM SCPOMGR.DFUMAP WHERE DFUMAP.TODMDUNIT=iv.TODMDUNIT and DFUMAP.TODMDGROUP=iv.TODMDGROUP and DFUMAP.TODFULOC=iv.TODFULOC and DFUMAP.TOMODEL=iv.TOMODEL AND DFUMAP.FROMDMDUNIT=iv.FROMDMDUNIT and DFUMAP.FROMDMDGROUP=iv.FROMDMDGROUP and DFUMAP.FROMDFULOC=iv.FROMDFULOC and DFUMAP.FROMMODEL=iv.FROMMODEL )

3y56c54s3unjw.fullText: SELECT /*+ parallel 8 */ /* BOMSelectQueryLiveHint */ BOM.BOMNUM, BOM.ITEM, BOM.LOC, BOM.SUBORD, BOM.EFF, BOM.DRAWQTY, BOM.YIELDFACTOR, BOM.DISC, BOM.OFFSET, BOM.MIXFACTOR, BOM.SHRINKAGEFACTOR, BOM.DRAWTYPE, BOM.YIELDCAL, '1' AS ORIGINAL, 1 AS PRIORITY, '' AS ALTSUBORD, BOM.SUBORDLOC, BOM.CONSUMSTEPNUM, BOM.BOMGROUP FROM BOM WHERE ( (BOM.ITEM, BOM.LOC) IN (SELECT ITEM, LOC FROM SKU WHERE MPBATCHNUM = :1 AND REPLENTYPE IN (4, 5) ) OR (SUBORD, BOM.LOC) IN (SELECT ITEM, LOC FROM SKU WHERE MPBATCHNUM = :2 AND REPLENTYPE IN (4, 5) ) OR (SUBORD, BOM.SUBORDLOC) IN (SELECT ITEM, LOC FROM SKU WHERE MPBATCHNUM = :3 AND REPLENTYPE IN (4, 5) ) )UNION ALL SELECT ALTBOM.BOMNUM, ALTBOM.ITEM, ALTBOM.LOC, ALTBOM.SUBORD SUBORD, ALTBOM.ALTSUBORDEFF EFF, ALTBOM.DRAWQTY, ALTBOM.YIELDFACTOR, ALTBOM.ALTSUBORDDISC DISC, ALTBOM.OFFSET, 0 AS MIXFACTOR, 0 AS SHRINKAGEFACTOR, 0 AS DRAWTYPE, ALTBOM.YIELDCAL, '0' AS ORIGINAL, ALTBOM.PRIORITY, ALTBOM.ALTSUBORD, ALTBOM.ALTSUBORDLOC, 0 AS CONSUMSTEPNUM, ALTBOM.ALTBOMGROUP BOMGROUP FROM ALTBOM WHERE (ALTBOM.ITEM, ALTBOM.LOC) IN (SELECT ITEM, LOC FROM SKU WHERE MPBATCHNUM = :4 AND REPLENTYPE IN (4, 5) ) AND ((ALTBOM.ALTSUBORD, ALTBOM.LOC) IN (SELECT ITEM, LOC FROM SKU WHERE MPBATCHNUM = :5 AND REPLENTYPE IN (4, 5) ) OR (ALTBOM.ALTSUBORD, ALTBOM.ALTSUBORDLOC) IN (SELECT ITEM, LOC FROM SKU WHERE MPBATCHNUM = :6 AND REPLENTYPE IN (4, 5) )) AND USAGESW='1' ORDER BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 14 DESC

4z4wjugdy607t.fullText: DECLARE v_cnt NUMBER; BEGIN pkg_log.info ('------------------------------------------------'); pkg_log.info ('JOB STARTED'); pkg_log.info ('-------------------------------------------------'); EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'ALTER SESSION ENABLE PARALLEL DML'; pkg_log.info ('Delete previous run Reconcile Forecast data' ); DELETE /*+ PARALLEL(f, 16) INDEX_FFS(f IDX_FCSTDRAFT) */ FROM scpomgr.fcstdraft f WHERE TYPE = 4; v_cnt := SQL%ROWCOUNT; COMMIT; pkg_log.info ('Total Reconcile Forecast records deleted:' || v_cnt); pkg_job.add_volume (v_cnt); EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'ALTER SESSION DISABLE PARALLEL DML'; EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN pkg_job.fatal_error; RAISE; END;

5fsbnpg09nq5p.fullText: DECLARE v_cnt NUMBER; BEGIN EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'ALTER SESSION ENABLE PARALLEL DML'; update /*+PARALLEL (f, 10) append */ scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst f set qty = 0 where not exists (select /*+ parallel (d, 10)*/ 1 from scpomgr.fcstdraft d where type in (1, 4, 8) and d.dmdunit = f.dmdunit and d.dmdgroup = f.dmdgroup and d.loc = f.loc and d.startdate = f.startdate ) and qty <> 0; commit; merge /*+ PARALLEL (d, 10) append */ into SCPOMGR.UDT_STAT_FCST d using (select /*+ PARALLEL (fd, 10) */ fd.DMDUNIT, fd.dmdgroup, fd.loc, startdate, dur, SUM(qty) statfcst from SCPOMGR.FCSTDRAFT fd, SCPOMGR.dfu dv WHERE TYPE IN (1, 4, 8) AND fd.dmdunit = dv.dmdunit AND fd.dmdgroup = dv.dmdgroup AND fd.loc = dv.loc AND fd.model = dv.model AND u_level = 'MAT-Customer-Loc' AND u_manual_fcst = 0 GROUP BY fd.dmdunit, fd.dmdgroup, fd.loc, s tartdate, dur) s on (s.dmdunit=d.dmdunit and s.dmdgroup=d.dmdgroup and s.loc=d.loc and s.startdate=d.startdate) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET d.qty = s.statfcst WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT /*+ APPEND */ (d.DMDUNIT, d.DMDGROUP, d.LOC , d.STARTDATE, d.dur, d.qty, d.SLSFCST) VALUES (s.DMDUNIT, s.DMDGROUP, s.LOC, s.STARTDATE, s.dur, s.statfcst, s.Statfcst); v_cnt := SQL%ROWCOUNT; COMMIT; pkg_log.metric ('No of rows copied into UDT_STAT_FCST are :', v_cnt); scpomgr.pkg_ddl.truncate_table ('UDT_FCSTADJ'); pkg_log.info ('UDT_FCSTADJ Table truncated'); insert /*+ append */ into scpomgr.udt_fcstadj (DMDUNIT, DMDGROUP, LOC, QTYTYPE_6, QTYTYPE_5, QTYTYPE_2, STARTDATE) (select /*+ parallel */ s.DMDUNIT, s.DMDGROUP, s.LOC, s.SLSFCST-s.QTY , s.REGFCST-s.SLSFCST , s.FINALFCST-s.REGFCST, s.STARTDATE from scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst s where startdate>=trunc(sysdate, 'MM')) ; v_cnt := SQL%ROWCOUNT; commit; pkg_log.metric ('No of rows copi ed into udt_fcstadj are :', v_cnt); scpomgr.PROC_FORECAST_ADJUSTMENT(); EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'ALTER SESSION DISABLE PARALLEL DML'; EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN pkg_job.fatal_error; RAISE; END;

5k6rddx79uf41.fullText: insert /*+ APPEND */ into scpomgr.dfumap(map, todmdunit, todmdgroup, todfuloc, fromdmdunit, fromdmdgroup, fromdfuloc, frommodel, tomodel, eff, disc) SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(8) */ * FROM ( select /*+ paralell(d2, 8) parallel(d1, 8) index_ffs(d2 indx_dfu_lvl) index_ffs(dmdgroup INDX_DMDGROUP_LVL) index_ffs(loc indx_loc_lvl) INDEX(D1 INDX_DFU_LEVEL) INDEX(D2 INDX_DFU_LEVEL) */ DISTINCT 'KIWE_122_122_534' MAP, DMDUNIT.U_LEVEL5 TODMDUNIT, DMDGROUP.U_KISOLDTO_REGION TODMDGROUP, LOC.U_ALL TODFULOC, DMDUNIT.DMDUNIT FROMDMDUNIT, DMDGROUP.U_COUNTRY FROMDMDGROUP, LOC.U_COUNTRY FROMDFULOC, D2.MODEL TOMODEL, D1.MODEL FROMMODEL, D2.EFF, D2.DISC from SCPOMGR.DMDUNIT , SCPOMGR.DMDGROUP, SCPOMGR.LOC, SCPOMGR.DFU D1, SCPOMGR.DFU D2 where DMDUNIT.U_MKT_ACT='122' AND DMDGROUP.U_KISOLDTO_REGION='KIWE' AND D1.DMDUNIT = DMDUNIT.U_LEVEL5 AND D1.DMDGROUP = DMDGROUP.U_KISOLDTO_RE GION AND D1.LOC = LOC.U_ALL AND D2.DMDUNIT = DMDUNIT.DMDUNIT AND D2.DMDGROUP = DMDGROUP.U_COUNTRY AND D2.LOC = LOC.U_COUNTRY AND D2.U_LEVEL = 'MAT-Country-Country' AND D1.U_LEVEL = 'MA-Region-ALL') iv WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(8) */ 1 FROM SCPOMGR.DFUMAP WHERE DFUMAP.TODMDUNIT=iv.TODMDUNIT and DFUMAP.TODMDGROUP=iv.TODMDGROUP and DFUMAP.TODFULOC=iv.TODFULOC and DFUMAP.TOMODEL=iv.TOMODEL AND DFUMAP.FROMDMDUNIT=iv.FROMDMDUNIT and DFUMAP.FROMDMDGROUP=iv.FROMDMDGROUP and DFUMAP.FROMDFULOC=iv.FROMDFULOC and DFUMAP.FROMMODEL=iv.FROMMODEL )

NULL OR BUCKET_END IS NULL OR (T M_BUCKET_START = BUCKET_START) THEN NULL WHEN TM_BUCKET_START = BUCKET_END THEN 'O' ELSE 'M' END TM_GROUP_TYPE, START_SEG, BUCKET_START, BUCKET_START_OFFSET, THEN BUCKET_END_OFFSET / LENGTH_SEG ELSE NULL END LAST_BUCKET_RATIO, CASE WHEN TM_BUCKET_START != BUCKET_END THEN (:B9 - TM_BUCKET_START_OFFSET) / TM_LENGTH_SEG ELSE 1 END TM_FIRST_BUCKET_RATIO, CASE WHEN BUCKET_END >= TM_BUCKE T_START + 2 THEN :B9 / TM_LENGTH_SEG ELSE NULL END TM_MIDDLE_BUCKETS_RATIO, CASE WHEN TM_BUCKET_START != BUCKET_END THEN BUCKET_END_OFFSET / TM_LENGTH_SEG ELSE NULL END TM_LAST_BUCKET_RATIO, TM_DELTA_CPU_TIME, TM_DELTA_DB_TIME, DELTA_READ_IO_REQUESTS DELTA_READ_REQUESTS, DELTA_WRITE_IO_REQUESTS DELTA_WRITE_REQUESTS, DELTA_READ_IO_BYTES DELTA_READ_BYTES, DELTA_WRITE_IO_BYTES DELTA_WRITE_BYTES, DELTA_INTERCONNECT_IO_BYTES DELTA_INTERCONNECT_BYTES, DELTA_READ_MEM_BYTES DELTA_READ_MEM_BYTES, PGA_ALLOCATED, TEMP_SPACE_ALLOCATED FROM (SELECT ROW_ID, SID, SAMPLE_TIME, START_SEG, TRUNC(START_SEG / :B9 ) BUCKET_START, MOD(START_SEG, :B9 ) BUCKET_START_OFFSET, TM_START_SEG, TRUNC(TM_START_SEG/:B9 ) TM_BUCKET_START, MOD(TM_START_SEG, :B9 ) TM_BUCKET_START_OFFSET, TRUNC(END_SEG/:B9 ) BUCKET_END, MOD(END_SEG, :B9 ) BUCKET_END_OFFSET, END_SEG, LENGTH_SEG, TM_LENGTH_SEG, TM_DELTA_CPU_TIME, TM_DELTA_DB_TIME, DELTA_READ_IO_REQUESTS, DELTA_WRITE_IO_REQUESTS, DELTA_READ_IO _BYTES, DELTA_WRITE_IO_BYTES, DELTA_INTERCONNECT_IO_BYTES, DELTA_READ_MEM_BYTES, PGA_ALLOCATED, TEMP_SPACE_ALLOCATED FROM (SELECT ROW_ID, SID, SAMPLE_TIME, TIME_INTERVAL, CASE WHEN START_SEG < 0 THEN 0 ELSE START_SEG END START_SEG, CASE WHEN TM_START_SEG < 0 THEN 0 ELSE TM_START_SEG END TM_START_SEG, CASE WHEN END_SEG > TIME_INTERVAL THEN TIME_INTERVAL ELSE END_SEG END END_SEG, (LENGTH_SEG - (CASE WHEN START_SEG < 0 THEN -START_SEG ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN END_SEG > TIME_INTERVAL THEN END_SEG - TIME_INTERVAL ELSE 0 END)) LENGTH_SEG, (TM_LENGTH_SEG - (CASE WHEN TM_START_SEG < 0 THEN -TM_START_SEG ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN END_SEG > TIME_INTERVAL THEN END_SEG - TIME_INTERVAL ELSE 0 END)) TM_LENGTH_SEG, TM_DELTA_CPU_TIME, TM_DELTA_DB_TIME, DELTA_READ_IO_REQUESTS, DELTA_WRITE_IO_REQUESTS, DELTA_READ_IO_BYTES, DELTA_WRITE_IO_BYTES, DELTA_INTERCONNECT_IO_BYTES, DELTA_READ_MEM_BYTES, PGA_ALLOCATED, TEMP_SPACE_ALLOCATED FROM (SELECT ROW_ID, SID, SAMPLE_ TIME, TIME_INTERVAL, LENGTH_SEG, TM_LENGTH_SEG, END_SEG - TM_LENGTH_SEG TM_START_SEG, END_SEG - LENGTH_SEG START_SEG, END_SEG, TM_DELTA_CPU_TIME, TM_DELTA_DB_TIME, DELTA_READ_IO_REQUESTS, DELTA_WRITE_IO_REQUESTS, DELTA_READ_IO_BYTES, DELTA_WRITE_IO_BYTES, DELTA_INTERCONNECT_IO_BYTES, DELTA_READ_MEM_BYTES, PGA_ALLOCATED, TEMP_SPACE_ALLOCATED FROM (SELECT ROW_ID, SID, SAMPLE_TIME, EXTRACT(SECOND FROM REL_SAMPLE_TIME_INT) + EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM REL_SAMPLE_TIME_INT)*60 + EXTRACT(HOUR FROM REL_SAMPLE_TIME_INT)*3600 + EXTRACT(DAY FROM REL_SAMPLE_TIME_INT)*3600*24 END_SEG, TIME_INTERVAL, DELTA_TIME/1000000 LENGTH_SEG, TM_DELTA_TIME/1000000 TM_LENGTH_SEG, TM_DELTA_CPU_TIME, TM_DELTA_DB_TIME, DELTA_READ_IO_REQUESTS, DELTA_WRITE_IO_REQUESTS, DELTA_READ_IO_BYTES, DELTA_WRITE_IO_BYTES, DELTA_INTERCONNECT_IO_BYTES, DELTA_READ_MEM_BYTES, PGA_ALLOCATED, TEMP_SPACE_ALLOCATED FROM (SELECT ROWNUM ROW_ID, SESSION_ID SID, CAST(FROM_TZ(SAMPLE_TIME, DBTIMEZONE) AS DATE) SAM PLE_DATE, SAMPLE_TIME, (SAMPLE_TIME - CAST(:B8 AS TIMESTAMP)) REL_SAMPLE_TIME_INT, TRUNC((:B7 - :B8 ) * 3600 * 24) TIME_INTERVAL, :B8 AS BND_START_INTERVAL , :B7 AS BND_END_INTERVAL , TM_DELTA_TIME, TM_DELTA_CPU_TIME, TM_DELTA_DB_TIME, DELTA_TIME, DELTA_READ_IO_REQUESTS, DELTA_WRITE_IO_REQUESTS, DELTA_READ_IO_BYTES, DELTA_WRITE_IO_BYTES, DELTA_INTERCONNECT_IO_BYTES, DELTA_READ_MEM_BYTES, PGA_ALLOCATED, TEMP_SPACE_ALLOCATED FROM (SELECT ASH0.* FROM V$ACTIVE_SESSION_HISTORY ASH0 WHERE SAMPLE_TIME BETWEEN :B6 AND :B5 AND ( (SESSION_ID = :B2 AND SESSION_SERIAL# = :B1 AND USERENV('INSTANCE') = :B3 ) OR (:B4 = 'yes' AND QC_INSTANCE_ID = :B3 AND QC_SESSION_ID = :B2 AND QC_SESSION_SERIAL# = :B1 ))) ) ASH1 WHERE SAMPLE_DATE >= BND_START_INTERVAL AND SAMPLE_DATE <= BND_END_INTERVAL + 120/3600/24 ) ) WHERE START_SEG <= TIME_INTERVAL ) WHERE (LENGTH_SEG IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH_SEG > 0) OR (TM_LENGTH_SEG IS NOT NULL AND TM_LENGTH_SEG > 0)) ) GROUP BY INST_ID, GROUP_T YPE, BUCKET_START, BUCKET_END, TM_GROUP_TYPE, TM_BUCKET_START, TM_BUCKET_END))) GVTF WHERE INST_ID >= :B11 AND INST_ID <= :B10 GROUP BY GROUP_TYPE, BUCKET_START, BUCKET_END, TM_GROUP_TYPE, TM_BUCKET_START, TM_BUCKET_END ) GROUP BY GROUPING SETS ( (GROUP_TYPE, BUCKET_START, BUCKET_END), (TM_GROUP_TYPE, TM_BUCKET_START, TM_BUCKET_END) )

ayc9pt8g9w1py.fullText: INSERT /*+ append */ INTO SCPOMGR.FCSTDRAFT ( DMDUNIT, DMDGROUP, LOC, STARTDATE, DUR, TYPE, FCSTID, QTY, MODEL) VALUES (:B8 , :B7 , :B6 , :B5 , :B4 , 4, 'DISAGG_REC_QTY', (:B3 *:B2 ), :B1 )

bcrbxzufa2sc6.fullText: select /*+ opt_param('_optimizer_use_auto_indexes' 'on') parallel_index(t, "FCSTDRAFT_SELECT", 8) dbms_stats cursor_sharing_exact use_weak_name_resl dynamic_sampling(0) no_monitoring xmlindex_sel_idx_tbl opt_param('optimizer_inmemory_aware' 'false') no_substrb_pad no_expand index_ffs(t, "FCSTDRAFT_SELECT") */ count(*) as nrw, approx_count_distinct(sys_op_lbid(80088, 'L', t.rowid)) as nlb, approx_count_distinct(sys_op_combined_hash("DMDGROUP", "DMDUNIT", "LOC", "MODEL", "STARTDATE", "SYS_NC00012$")) as ndk, sys_op_countchg(substrb(t.rowid, 1, 15), 1) as clf from "SCPOMGR"."FCSTDRAFT" t where "DMDGROUP" is not null or "DMDUNIT" is not null or "LOC" is not null or "MODEL" is not null or "STARTDATE" is no t null or "SYS_NC00012$" is not null

bgx1k0gtx6zy3.fullText: insert /*+ APPEND */ into scpomgr.dfumap(map, todmdunit, todmdgroup, todfuloc, fromdmdunit, fromdmdgroup, fromdfuloc, frommodel, tomodel, eff, disc) SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(8) */ * FROM ( select /*+ paralell(d2, 8) parallel(d1, 8) index_ffs(d2 indx_dfu_lvl) index_ffs(dmdgroup INDX_DMDGROUP_LVL) index_ffs(loc indx_loc_lvl) INDEX(D1 INDX_DFU_LEVEL) INDEX(D2 INDX_DFU_LEVEL) */ DISTINCT 'KAD30000-KCS_65000010-KCS' MAP, DMDUNIT.U_LEVEL5 TODMDUNIT, DMDGROUP.U_KISOLDTO_REGION TODMDGROUP, LOC.U_ALL TODFULOC, DMDUNIT.DMDUNIT FROMDMDUNIT, DMDGROUP.U_COUNTRY FROMDMDGROUP, LOC.U_COUNTRY FROMDFULOC, D2.MODEL TOMODEL, D1.MODEL FROMMODEL, D2.EFF, D2.DISC from SCPOMGR.DMDUNIT , SCPOMGR.DMDGROUP, SCPOMGR.LOC, SCPOMGR.DFU D1, SCPOMGR.DFU D2 where DMDUNIT.U_MKT_ACT='KAD30000-KCS' AND DMDGROUP.U_KISOLDTO_REGION='65000010-KCS' AND D1.DMDUNIT = DMDUNIT.U_LEVEL5 AND D1.DMDGROUP = DMDGROUP.U_KISOLDTO_REGION AND D1.LOC = LOC.U_ALL AND D2.DMDUNIT = DMDUNIT.DMDUNIT AND D2.DMDGROUP = DMDGROUP.U_COUNTRY AND D2.LOC = LOC.U_COUNTRY AND D2.U_LEVEL = 'MAT-Country-Country' AND D1.U_LEVEL = 'MA-Region-ALL') iv WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(8) */ 1 FROM SCPOMGR.DFUMAP WHERE DFUMAP.TODMDUNIT=iv.TODMDUNIT and DFUMAP.TODMDGROUP=iv.TODMDGROUP and DFUMAP.TODFULOC=iv.TODFULOC and DFUMAP.TOMODEL=iv.TOMODEL AND DFUMAP.FROMDMDUNIT=iv.FROMDMDUNIT and DFUMAP.FROMDMDGROUP=iv.FROMDMDGROUP and DFUMAP.FROMDFULOC=iv.FROMDFULOC and DFUMAP.FROMMODEL=iv.FROMMODEL )

bvykkffstkpur.fullText: SELECT /* FcstAllocBaseDFUToSKUNormalTVQHint */ dfutoskufcst.item, dfutoskufcst.skuloc, dfutoskufcst.startdate, dfutoskufcst.dur, dfutoskufcst.supersedesw, dfutoskufcst.totfcst, dfutoskufcst.type FROM PROCESSSKU, DFUTOSKUFCST WHERE ( DFUTOSKUFCST.ITEM=PROCESSSKU.ITEM AND DFUTOSKUFCST.SKULOC=PROCESSSKU.LOC) AND ( ( processsku.processid = :1 and processsku.batchnum = :2 ) ) ORDER BY dfutoskufcst.item, dfutoskufcst.skuloc, dfutoskufcst.startdate ASC

c59afp1t20jvm.fullText: DELETE FROM SCPOMGR.FCSTDRAFT WHERE TYPE IN (2, 5, 6)

dfh7t181j94rn.fullText: SELECT /*+ PARALLEL */ NVL(COUNT(DISTINCT FROMDMDUNIT), 0) FROM SCPOMGR.UDT_ALT_SKU_MAP WHERE FROMDMDUNIT=:B1

dqpwrs34cbf54.fullText: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys.v_$open_cursor WHERE sid = SYS_CONTEXT('USERENV', 'SID') AND cursor_type = 'OPEN_PLSQL'

dtknc5b5g6h0h.fullText: UPDATE SRE_NODE SET LOCKERS_NODE_ID = :B1 WHERE (((NODE_STATE = :B5 ) AND (SRE_NODE.STOP_REQUEST_DATE < (SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) - :B4 )) ) OR (NODE_STATE = :B3 ) ) AND (CURRENT_JOB_ID = :B2 AND LOCKERS_NODE_ID IS NULL AND NODE_ID <> :B1 AND ROWNUM = 1) RETURNING NODE_ID INTO :O0

f5dqupu2hknzu.fullText: WITH a as (SELECT a$.dbid, a$.snap_id, a$.INSTANCE_NUMBER, a$.PLSQL_ENTRY_OBJECT_ID, a$.PLSQL_ENTRY_SUBPROGRAM_ID, a$.TIME_MODEL, a$.CON_DBID FROM WRH$_ACTIVE_SESSION_HISTORY a$ WHERE a$.dbid = :dbid AND a$.instance_number = :inst AND a$.snap_id > :bid AND a$.snap_id <= :eid AND a$.session_type = 1 ) , ash as (SELECT cnt , CON_DBID, PLSQL_ENTRY_OBJECT_ID, PLSQL_ENTRY_SUBPROGRAM_ID FROM ( SELECT count(*) as cnt , a.CON_DBID, a.PLSQL_ENTRY_OBJECT_ID, a.PLSQL_ENTRY_SUBPROGRAM_ID FROM a WHERE bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 11 )) !=0 AND a.PLSQL_ENTRY_OBJECT_ID > 0 AND a.PLSQL_ENTRY_SUBPROGRAM_ID > 0 GROUP BY CON_DBID, PLSQL_ENTRY_OBJECT_ID, PLSQL_ENTRY_SUBPROGRAM_ID HAVING count(*) >= :rowcnt ORDER BY 1 DESC, 2 ASC ) WHERE rownum <= :ret) SELECT x.con_dbid, x.plsql_entry_object_id, x.plsql_entry_subprogram_id, dba.object_name, dba.object_type, dba.owner, dba.procedure_name, to_number(dba.overload), x.cnt FROM dba_procedures dba, ash x WHERE x.plsql_entry_object_id = dba.object_id(+) AND x.plsql_entry_subprogram_id = dba.subprogram_id(+) ORDER BY x.cnt DESC, x.plsql_entry_object_id, x.plsql_entry_subprogram_id

fnjp0rw8mjbdc.fullText: create table dfcst_gmw as WITH t AS ( SELECT /*+ parallel 16 */ DISTINCT SUM (df.totfcst * i.u_ton_ratio) OVER (PARTITION BY i.u_mkt_act, l.u_country, df.startdate, i.u_seg, df.dur) AS df_qty, df.startdate, i.u_mkt_act, l.u_country, i.u_seg FROM scpomgr.dfutoskufcst df, scpomgr.item i, scpomgr.loc l, scpomgr.udt_fcst_netting_config u WHERE df.item = i.item AND i .u_mkt_act = u.market_act AND df.skuloc = l.loc and l.u_country = decode(u.country, 'ALL', l.u_country) AND i.u_seg = u.segment and u.scope='GMW' ORDER BY startdate), t1 as ( select t.*, ((df_qty/dc.numdays_month)*dc.past_days) as partial_gross_fcst, ((df_qty/dc.numdays_month)*dc.days_month) as rem_gross_fcst from t, DATE_CALC dc where t.startdate = dc.mth ) select * from t1

fs65f1trnn5gp.fullText: UPDATE /*+PARALLEL (f, 10) append */ SCPOMGR.UDT_STAT_FCST F SET QTY = 0 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT /*+ parallel (d, 10)*/ 1 FROM SCPOMGR.FCSTDRAFT D WHERE TYPE IN (1, 4, 8) AND D.DMDUNIT = F.DMDUNIT AND D.DMDGROUP = F.DMDGROUP AND D.LOC = F.LOC AND D.STARTDATE = F.STARTDATE ) AND QTY <> 0

ftzxbzrg3xzbr.fullText: MERGE /*+ PARALLEL (d, 10) append */ INTO SCPOMGR.UDT_STAT_FCST D USING (SELECT /*+ PARALLEL (fd, 10) */ FD.DMDUNIT, FD.DMDGROUP, FD.LOC, STARTDATE, DUR, SUM(QTY) STATFCST FROM SCPOMGR.FCSTDRAFT FD, SCPOMGR.DFU DV WHERE TYPE IN (1, 4, 8) AND FD.DMDUNIT = DV.DMDUNIT AND FD.DMDGROUP = DV.DMDGROUP AND FD.LOC = DV.LOC AND FD.MODEL = DV.MODEL AND U_LEVEL = 'MAT-Customer-Loc' AND U_MANUAL_FCST = 0 GROUP BY FD.DMDUNIT, FD.DMDGROUP, FD.LOC, STARTDATE, DUR) S ON (S.DMDUNIT=D.DMDUNIT AND S.DMDGROUP=D.DMDGROUP AND S.LOC=D.LOC AND S.STARTDATE=D.STARTDATE) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET D.QTY = S.STATFCST WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT /*+ APPEND */ (D.DMDUNIT, D.DMDGROUP, D.LOC , D.STARTDATE, D.DUR, D.QTY, D.SLSFCST) VALUES (S.DMDUNIT, S.DMDGROUP, S.LOC, S.STARTDATE, S.DUR, S.STATFCST, S.STATFCST)

fxsgvypw8gd4m.fullText: SELECT /*+ PARALLEL */ COUNT(DISTINCT DMDUNIT) FROM SCPOMGR.DMDUNIT WHERE U_MTO_HEADER_MAT_FLAG=1 AND U_DUM_MAT_FLAG=1 AND U_LEVEL3=:B1 AND (U_PROD_GRP IS NULL OR U_PROD_GRP='NOT_AVAILABLE')

g8aqtr39q296s.fullText: insert /*+ APPEND */ into scpomgr.dfumap(map, todmdunit, todmdgroup, todfuloc, fromdmdunit, fromdmdgroup, fromdfuloc, frommodel, tomodel, eff, disc) SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(8) */ * FROM ( select /*+ paralell(d2, 8) parallel(d1, 8) index_ffs(d2 indx_dfu_lvl) index_ffs(dmdgroup INDX_DMDGROUP_LVL) index_ffs(loc indx_loc_lvl) INDEX(D1 INDX_DFU_LEVEL) INDEX(D2 INDX_DFU_LEVEL) */ DISTINCT 'KICE_121_122_534' MAP, DMDUNIT.U_LEVEL5 TODMDUNIT, DMDGROUP.U_KISOLDTO_REGION TODMDGROUP, LOC.U_ALL TODFULOC, DMDUNIT.DMDUNIT FROMDMDUNIT, DMDGROUP.U_COUNTRY FROMDMDGROUP, LOC.U_COUNTRY FROMDFULOC, D2.MODEL TOMODEL, D1.MODEL FROMMODEL, D2.EFF, D2.DISC from SCPOMGR.DMDUNIT , SCPOMGR.DMDGROUP, SCPOMGR.LOC, SCPOMGR.DFU D1, SCPOMGR.DFU D2 where DMDUNIT.U_MKT_ACT='121' AND DMDGROUP.U_KISOLDTO_REGION='KICE' AND D1.DMDUNIT = DMDUNIT.U_LEVEL5 AND D1.DMDGROUP = DMDGROUP.U_KISOLDTO_REGI ON AND D1.LOC = LOC.U_ALL AND D2.DMDUNIT = DMDUNIT.DMDUNIT AND D2.DMDGROUP = DMDGROUP.U_COUNTRY AND D2.LOC = LOC.U_COUNTRY AND D2.U_LEVEL = 'MAT-Country-Country' AND D1.U_LEVEL = 'MA-Region-ALL') iv WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(8) */ 1 FROM SCPOMGR.DFUMAP WHERE DFUMAP.TODMDUNIT=iv.TODMDUNIT and DFUMAP.TODMDGROUP=iv.TODMDGROUP and DFUMAP.TODFULOC=iv.TODFULOC and DFUMAP.TOMODEL=iv.TOMODEL AND DFUMAP.FROMDMDUNIT=iv.FROMDMDUNIT and DFUMAP.FROMDMDGROUP=iv.FROMDMDGROUP and DFUMAP.FROMDFULOC=iv.FROMDFULOC and DFUMAP.FROMMODEL=iv.FROMMODEL )

_sql_text_map.0h16msq5g0883: SELECT NAME, VALUE FROM SRE_GLOBAL_PROPERTY WHERE NAME IN (:B8 , :B7 , :B6 , :B5 , :B4 , :B3 , :B2 , :B1 )
_sql_text_map.0snj1ma7k0xb3: select /*+ opt_param('_optimizer_use_auto_indexes' 'on') parallel_index(t, "FCSTDRAFT_PK", 8) dbms_stats cursor_sharing_exact use_weak_name_resl dynamic_sampling(0) no_monitoring xmlindex_sel_idx_tbl opt_param('optimizer_inmemory_aware' 'false') no_substrb_pad no_expand index_ffs(t, "FCSTDRAFT_PK") */ count(*) as nrw, approx_count_distinct(sys_op_lbid(81418, 'L', t.rowid)) as nlb, null as ndk, sys_op_countchg(substrb(t.rowid, 1, 15), 1) as clf from "SCPOMGR"."FCSTDRAFT" t where "DMDUNIT" is not null or "DMDGROUP" is not null or "LOC" is not null or "MODEL" is not null or "STARTDATE" is not null or "TYPE" is not null or "FCSTID" is not null
_sql_text_map.0za9fv0j1vgkk: WITH MONITOR_DATA AS (SELECT * FROM TABLE(GV$(CURSOR( SELECT USERENV('instance') AS INST_ID, KEY, NVL2(PX_QCSID, NULL, STATUS) STATUS, FIRST_REFRESH_TIME, _sql_text_map.3y56c54s3unjw: SELECT /*+ parallel 8 */ /* BOMSelectQueryLiveHint */ BOM.BOMNUM, BOM.ITEM, BOM.LOC, BOM.SUBORD, BOM.EFF, BOM.DRAWQTY, BOM.YIELDFACTOR, BOM.DISC, BOM.OFFSET, BOM.MIXFACTOR, BOM.SHRINKAGEFACTOR, BOM.DRAWTYPE, BOM.YIELDCAL, '1' AS ORIGINAL, 1 AS PRIORITY, '' AS ALTSUBORD, BOM.SUBORDLOC, BOM.CONSUMSTEPNUM, BOM.BOMGROUP FROM BOM WHERE ( (BOM.ITEM, BOM.LOC) IN (SELECT ITEM, LOC FROM SKU WHERE MPBATCHNUM = :1 AND REPLENTYPE IN (4, 5) ) OR (SUBORD, BOM.LOC) IN (SELECT ITEM, LOC FROM SKU WHERE MPBATCHNUM = :2 AND REPLENTYPE IN (4, 5) ) OR (SUBORD, BOM.SUBORDLOC) IN (SELECT ITEM, LOC FROM SKU WHERE MPBATCHNUM = :3 AND REPLENTYPE IN (4, 5) ) )UNION ALL SELECT ALTBOM.BOMNUM, ALTBOM.ITEM, ALTBOM.LOC, ALTBOM.SUBORD SUBORD, ALTBOM.ALTSUBORDEFF EFF, ALTBOM.DRAWQTY, ALTBOM.YIELDFACTOR, ALTBOM.ALTSUBORDDISC DISC, ALTBOM.OFFSET, 0 AS MIXFACTOR, 0 AS SHRINKAGEFACTOR, 0 AS DRAWTYPE, ALTBOM.YIELDCAL, '0' AS ORIGINAL, ALTBOM.PRIORITY, ALTBOM.ALTSUBORD, ALTBOM.ALTSUBORDLOC, 0 AS CONSUMSTEPNUM, ALTBOM.ALTBOMGROUP BOMGROUP FROM ALTBOM WHERE (ALTBOM.ITEM, ALTBOM.LOC) IN (SELECT ITEM, LOC FROM SKU WHERE MPBATCHNUM = :4 AND REPLENTYPE IN (4, 5) ) AND ((ALTBOM.ALTSUBORD, ALTBOM.LOC) IN (SELECT ITEM, LOC FROM SKU WHERE MPBATCHNUM = :5 AND REPLENTYPE IN (4, 5) ) OR (ALTBOM.ALTSUBORD, ALTBOM.ALTSUBORDLOC) IN (SELECT ITEM, LOC FROM SKU WHERE MPBATCHNUM = :6 AND REPLENTYPE IN (4, 5) )) AND USAGESW='1' ORDER BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 14 DESC

_sql_text_map.4z4wjugdy607t: DECLARE v_cnt NUMBER; BEGIN pkg_log.info ('------------------------------------------------'); pkg_log.info ('JOB STARTED'); pkg_log.info ('-------------------------------------------------'); EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'ALTER SESSION ENABLE PARALLEL DML'; pkg_log.info ('Delete previous run Reconcile Forecast data' ); DELETE /*+ PARALLEL(f, 16) INDEX_FFS(f IDX_FCSTDRAFT) */ FROM scpomgr.fcstdraft f WHERE TYPE = 4; v_cnt := SQL%ROWCOUNT; COMMIT; pkg_log.info ('Total Reconcile Forecast records deleted:' || v_cnt); pkg_job.add_volume (v_cnt); EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'ALTER SESSION DISABLE PARALLEL DML'; EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN pkg_job.fatal_error; RAISE; END;

_sql_text_map.5fsbnpg09nq5p: DECLARE v_cnt NUMBER; BEGIN EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'ALTER SESSION ENABLE PARALLEL DML'; update /*+PARALLEL (f, 10) append */ scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst f set qty = 0 where not exists (select /*+ parallel (d, 10)*/ 1 from scpomgr.fcstdraft d where type in (1, 4, 8) and d.dmdunit = f.dmdunit and d.dmdgroup = f.dmdgroup and d.loc = f.loc and d.startdate = f.startdate ) and qty <> 0; commit; merge /*+ PARALLEL (d, 10) append */ into SCPOMGR.UDT_STAT_FCST d using (select /*+ PARALLEL (fd, 10) */ fd.DMDUNIT, fd.dmdgroup, fd.loc, startdate, dur, SUM(qty) statfcst from SCPOMGR.FCSTDRAFT fd, SCPOMGR.dfu dv WHERE TYPE IN (1, 4, 8) AND fd.dmdunit = dv.dmdunit AND fd.dmdgroup = dv.dmdgroup AND fd.loc = dv.loc AND fd.model = dv.model AND u_level = 'MAT-Customer-Loc' AND u_manual_fcst = 0 GROUP BY fd.dmdunit, fd.dmdgroup, fd.loc, s tartdate, dur) s on (s.dmdunit=d.dmdunit and s.dmdgroup=d.dmdgroup and s.loc=d.loc and s.startdate=d.startdate) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET d.qty = s.statfcst WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT /*+ APPEND */ (d.DMDUNIT, d.DMDGROUP, d.LOC , d.STARTDATE, d.dur, d.qty, d.SLSFCST) VALUES (s.DMDUNIT, s.DMDGROUP, s.LOC, s.STARTDATE, s.dur, s.statfcst, s.Statfcst); v_cnt := SQL%ROWCOUNT; COMMIT; pkg_log.metric ('No of rows copied into UDT_STAT_FCST are :', v_cnt); scpomgr.pkg_ddl.truncate_table ('UDT_FCSTADJ'); pkg_log.info ('UDT_FCSTADJ Table truncated'); insert /*+ append */ into scpomgr.udt_fcstadj (DMDUNIT, DMDGROUP, LOC, QTYTYPE_6, QTYTYPE_5, QTYTYPE_2, STARTDATE) (select /*+ parallel */ s.DMDUNIT, s.DMDGROUP, s.LOC, s.SLSFCST-s.QTY , s.REGFCST-s.SLSFCST , s.FINALFCST-s.REGFCST, s.STARTDATE from scpomgr.udt_stat_fcst s where startdate>=trunc(sysdate, 'MM')) ; v_cnt := SQL%ROWCOUNT; commit; pkg_log.metric ('No of rows copi ed into udt_fcstadj are :', v_cnt); scpomgr.PROC_FORECAST_ADJUSTMENT(); EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'ALTER SESSION DISABLE PARALLEL DML'; EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN pkg_job.fatal_error; RAISE; END;

SAMPLE_TIME, START_SEG, TRUNC(START_SEG / :B9 ) BUCKET_START, MOD(START_SEG, :B9 ) BUCKET_START_OFFSET, TM_START_SEG, TRUNC(TM_START_SEG/:B9 ) TM_BUCKET_START, MOD(TM_START_SEG, :B9 ) TM_BUCKET_START_OFFSET, TRUNC(END_SEG/:B9 ) BUCKET_END, MOD(END_SEG, :B9 ) BUCKET_END_OFFSET, END_SEG, LENGTH_SEG, TM_LENGTH_SEG, TM_DELTA_CPU_TIME, TM_DELTA_DB_TIME, DELTA_READ_IO_REQUESTS, DELTA_WRITE_IO_REQUESTS, DELTA_READ_IO _BYTES, DELTA_WRITE_IO_BYTES, DELTA_INTERCONNECT_IO_BYTES, DELTA_READ_MEM_BYTES, PGA_ALLOCATED, TEMP_SPACE_ALLOCATED FROM (SELECT ROW_ID, SID, SAMPLE_TIME, TIME_INTERVAL, CASE WHEN START_SEG < 0 THEN 0 ELSE START_SEG END START_SEG, CASE WHEN TM_START_SEG < 0 THEN 0 ELSE TM_START_SEG END TM_START_SEG, CASE WHEN END_SEG > TIME_INTERVAL THEN TIME_INTERVAL ELSE END_SEG END END_SEG, (LENGTH_SEG - (CASE WHEN START_SEG < 0 THEN -START_SEG ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN END_SEG > TIME_INTERVAL THEN END_SEG - TIME_INTERVAL ELSE 0 END)) LENGTH_SEG, (TM_LENGTH_SEG - (CASE WHEN TM_START_SEG < 0 THEN -TM_START_SEG ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN END_SEG > TIME_INTERVAL THEN END_SEG - TIME_INTERVAL ELSE 0 END)) TM_LENGTH_SEG, TM_DELTA_CPU_TIME, TM_DELTA_DB_TIME, DELTA_READ_IO_REQUESTS, DELTA_WRITE_IO_REQUESTS, DELTA_READ_IO_BYTES, DELTA_WRITE_IO_BYTES, DELTA_INTERCONNECT_IO_BYTES, DELTA_READ_MEM_BYTES, PGA_ALLOCATED, TEMP_SPACE_ALLOCATED FROM (SELECT ROW_ID, SID, SAMPLE_ TIME, TIME_INTERVAL, LENGTH_SEG, TM_LENGTH_SEG, END_SEG - TM_LENGTH_SEG TM_START_SEG, END_SEG - LENGTH_SEG START_SEG, END_SEG, TM_DELTA_CPU_TIME, TM_DELTA_DB_TIME, DELTA_READ_IO_REQUESTS, DELTA_WRITE_IO_REQUESTS, DELTA_READ_IO_BYTES, DELTA_WRITE_IO_BYTES, DELTA_INTERCONNECT_IO_BYTES, DELTA_READ_MEM_BYTES, PGA_ALLOCATED, TEMP_SPACE_ALLOCATED FROM (SELECT ROW_ID, SID, SAMPLE_TIME, EXTRACT(SECOND FROM REL_SAMPLE_TIME_INT) + EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM REL_SAMPLE_TIME_INT)*60 + EXTRACT(HOUR FROM REL_SAMPLE_TIME_INT)*3600 + EXTRACT(DAY FROM REL_SAMPLE_TIME_INT)*3600*24 END_SEG, TIME_INTERVAL, DELTA_TIME/1000000 LENGTH_SEG, TM_DELTA_TIME/1000000 TM_LENGTH_SEG, TM_DELTA_CPU_TIME, TM_DELTA_DB_TIME, DELTA_READ_IO_REQUESTS, DELTA_WRITE_IO_REQUESTS, DELTA_READ_IO_BYTES, DELTA_WRITE_IO_BYTES, DELTA_INTERCONNECT_IO_BYTES, DELTA_READ_MEM_BYTES, PGA_ALLOCATED, TEMP_SPACE_ALLOCATED FROM (SELECT ROWNUM ROW_ID, SESSION_ID SID, CAST(FROM_TZ(SAMPLE_TIME, DBTIMEZONE) AS DATE) SAM PLE_DATE, SAMPLE_TIME, (SAMPLE_TIME - CAST(:B8 AS TIMESTAMP)) REL_SAMPLE_TIME_INT, TRUNC((:B7 - :B8 ) * 3600 * 24) TIME_INTERVAL, :B8 AS BND_START_INTERVAL , :B7 AS BND_END_INTERVAL , TM_DELTA_TIME, TM_DELTA_CPU_TIME, TM_DELTA_DB_TIME, DELTA_TIME, DELTA_READ_IO_REQUESTS, DELTA_WRITE_IO_REQUESTS, DELTA_READ_IO_BYTES, DELTA_WRITE_IO_BYTES, DELTA_INTERCONNECT_IO_BYTES, DELTA_READ_MEM_BYTES, PGA_ALLOCATED, TEMP_SPACE_ALLOCATED FROM (SELECT ASH0.* FROM V$ACTIVE_SESSION_HISTORY ASH0 WHERE SAMPLE_TIME BETWEEN :B6 AND :B5 AND ( (SESSION_ID = :B2 AND SESSION_SERIAL# = :B1 AND USERENV('INSTANCE') = :B3 ) OR (:B4 = 'yes' AND QC_INSTANCE_ID = :B3 AND QC_SESSION_ID = :B2 AND QC_SESSION_SERIAL# = :B1 ))) ) ASH1 WHERE SAMPLE_DATE >= BND_START_INTERVAL AND SAMPLE_DATE <= BND_END_INTERVAL + 120/3600/24 ) ) WHERE START_SEG <= TIME_INTERVAL ) WHERE (LENGTH_SEG IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH_SEG > 0) OR (TM_LENGTH_SEG IS NOT NULL AND TM_LENGTH_SEG > 0)) ) GROUP BY INST_ID, GROUP_T YPE, BUCKET_START, BUCKET_END, TM_GROUP_TYPE, TM_BUCKET_START, TM_BUCKET_END))) GVTF WHERE INST_ID >= :B11 AND INST_ID <= :B10 GROUP BY GROUP_TYPE, BUCKET_START, BUCKET_END, TM_GROUP_TYPE, TM_BUCKET_START, TM_BUCKET_END ) GROUP BY GROUPING SETS ( (GROUP_TYPE, BUCKET_START, BUCKET_END), (TM_GROUP_TYPE, TM_BUCKET_START, TM_BUCKET_END) )
_sql_text_map.ayc9pt8g9w1py: INSERT /*+ append */ INTO SCPOMGR.FCSTDRAFT ( DMDUNIT, DMDGROUP, LOC, STARTDATE, DUR, TYPE, FCSTID, QTY, MODEL) VALUES (:B8 , :B7 , :B6 , :B5 , :B4 , 4, 'DISAGG_REC_QTY', (:B3 *:B2 ), :B1 )
_sql_text_map.bcrbxzufa2sc6: select /*+ opt_param('_optimizer_use_auto_indexes' 'on') parallel_index(t, "FCSTDRAFT_SELECT", 8) dbms_stats cursor_sharing_exact use_weak_name_resl dynamic_sampling(0) no_monitoring xmlindex_sel_idx_tbl opt_param('optimizer_inmemory_aware' 'false') no_substrb_pad no_expand index_ffs(t, "FCSTDRAFT_SELECT") */ count(*) as nrw, approx_count_distinct(sys_op_lbid(80088, 'L', t.rowid)) as nlb, approx_count_distinct(sys_op_combined_hash("DMDGROUP", "DMDUNIT", "LOC", "MODEL", "STARTDATE", "SYS_NC00012$")) as ndk, sys_op_countchg(substrb(t.rowid, 1, 15), 1) as clf from "SCPOMGR"."FCSTDRAFT" t where "DMDGROUP" is not null or "DMDUNIT" is not null or "LOC" is not null or "MODEL" is not null or "STARTDATE" is no t null or "SYS_NC00012$" is not null
_sql_text_map.bgx1k0gtx6zy3: insert /*+ APPEND */ into scpomgr.dfumap(map, todmdunit, todmdgroup, todfuloc, fromdmdunit, fromdmdgroup, fromdfuloc, frommodel, tomodel, eff, disc) SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(8) */ * FROM ( select /*+ paralell(d2, 8) parallel(d1, 8) index_ffs(d2 indx_dfu_lvl) index_ffs(dmdgroup INDX_DMDGROUP_LVL) index_ffs(loc indx_loc_lvl) INDEX(D1 INDX_DFU_LEVEL) INDEX(D2 INDX_DFU_LEVEL) */ DISTINCT 'KAD30000-KCS_65000010-KCS' MAP, DMDUNIT.U_LEVEL5 TODMDUNIT, DMDGROUP.U_KISOLDTO_REGION TODMDGROUP, LOC.U_ALL TODFULOC, DMDUNIT.DMDUNIT FROMDMDUNIT, DMDGROUP.U_COUNTRY FROMDMDGROUP, LOC.U_COUNTRY FROMDFULOC, D2.MODEL TOMODEL, D1.MODEL FROMMODEL, D2.EFF, D2.DISC from SCPOMGR.DMDUNIT , SCPOMGR.DMDGROUP, SCPOMGR.LOC, SCPOMGR.DFU D1, SCPOMGR.DFU D2 where DMDUNIT.U_MKT_ACT='KAD30000-KCS' AND DMDGROUP.U_KISOLDTO_REGION='65000010-KCS' AND D1.DMDUNIT = DMDUNIT.U_LEVEL5 AND D1.DMDGROUP = DMDGROUP.U_KISOLDTO_REGION AND D1.LOC = LOC.U_ALL AND D2.DMDUNIT = DMDUNIT.DMDUNIT AND D2.DMDGROUP = DMDGROUP.U_COUNTRY AND D2.LOC = LOC.U_COUNTRY AND D2.U_LEVEL = 'MAT-Country-Country' AND D1.U_LEVEL = 'MA-Region-ALL') iv WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(8) */ 1 FROM SCPOMGR.DFUMAP WHERE DFUMAP.TODMDUNIT=iv.TODMDUNIT and DFUMAP.TODMDGROUP=iv.TODMDGROUP and DFUMAP.TODFULOC=iv.TODFULOC and DFUMAP.TOMODEL=iv.TOMODEL AND DFUMAP.FROMDMDUNIT=iv.FROMDMDUNIT and DFUMAP.FROMDMDGROUP=iv.FROMDMDGROUP and DFUMAP.FROMDFULOC=iv.FROMDFULOC and DFUMAP.FROMMODEL=iv.FROMMODEL )
_sql_text_map.bvykkffstkpur: SELECT /* FcstAllocBaseDFUToSKUNormalTVQHint */ dfutoskufcst.item, dfutoskufcst.skuloc, dfutoskufcst.startdate, dfutoskufcst.dur, dfutoskufcst.supersedesw, dfutoskufcst.totfcst, dfutoskufcst.type FROM PROCESSSKU, DFUTOSKUFCST WHERE ( DFUTOSKUFCST.ITEM=PROCESSSKU.ITEM AND DFUTOSKUFCST.SKULOC=PROCESSSKU.LOC) AND ( ( processsku.processid = :1 and processsku.batchnum = :2 ) ) ORDER BY dfutoskufcst.item, dfutoskufcst.skuloc, dfutoskufcst.startdate ASC
_sql_text_map.c59afp1t20jvm: DELETE FROM SCPOMGR.FCSTDRAFT WHERE TYPE IN (2, 5, 6)
_sql_text_map.dfh7t181j94rn: SELECT /*+ PARALLEL */ NVL(COUNT(DISTINCT FROMDMDUNIT), 0) FROM SCPOMGR.UDT_ALT_SKU_MAP WHERE FROMDMDUNIT=:B1
_sql_text_map.dqpwrs34cbf54: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys.v_$open_cursor WHERE sid = SYS_CONTEXT('USERENV', 'SID') AND cursor_type = 'OPEN_PLSQL'
_sql_text_map.dtknc5b5g6h0h: UPDATE SRE_NODE SET LOCKERS_NODE_ID = :B1 WHERE (((NODE_STATE = :B5 ) AND (SRE_NODE.STOP_REQUEST_DATE < (SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) - :B4 )) ) OR (NODE_STATE = :B3 ) ) AND (CURRENT_JOB_ID = :B2 AND LOCKERS_NODE_ID IS NULL AND NODE_ID <> :B1 AND ROWNUM = 1) RETURNING NODE_ID INTO :O0
_sql_text_map.f5dqupu2hknzu: WITH a as (SELECT a$.dbid, a$.snap_id, a$.INSTANCE_NUMBER, a$.PLSQL_ENTRY_OBJECT_ID, a$.PLSQL_ENTRY_SUBPROGRAM_ID, a$.TIME_MODEL, a$.CON_DBID FROM WRH$_ACTIVE_SESSION_HISTORY a$ WHERE a$.dbid = :dbid AND a$.instance_number = :inst AND a$.snap_id > :bid AND a$.snap_id <= :eid AND a$.session_type = 1 ) , ash as (SELECT cnt , CON_DBID, PLSQL_ENTRY_OBJECT_ID, PLSQL_ENTRY_SUBPROGRAM_ID FROM ( SELECT count(*) as cnt , a.CON_DBID, a.PLSQL_ENTRY_OBJECT_ID, a.PLSQL_ENTRY_SUBPROGRAM_ID FROM a WHERE bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 11 )) !=0 AND a.PLSQL_ENTRY_OBJECT_ID > 0 AND a.PLSQL_ENTRY_SUBPROGRAM_ID > 0 GROUP BY CON_DBID, PLSQL_ENTRY_OBJECT_ID, PLSQL_ENTRY_SUBPROGRAM_ID HAVING count(*) >= :rowcnt ORDER BY 1 DESC, 2 ASC ) WHERE rownum <= :ret) SELECT x.con_dbid, x.plsql_entry_object_id, x.plsql_entry_subprogram_id, dba.object_name, dba.object_type, dba.owner, dba.procedure_name, to_number(dba.overload), x.cnt FROM dba_procedures dba, ash x WHERE x.plsql_entry_object_id = dba.object_id(+) AND x.plsql_entry_subprogram_id = dba.subprogram_id(+) ORDER BY x.cnt DESC, x.plsql_entry_object_id, x.plsql_entry_subprogram_id
_sql_text_map.fnjp0rw8mjbdc: create table dfcst_gmw as WITH t AS ( SELECT /*+ parallel 16 */ DISTINCT SUM (df.totfcst * i.u_ton_ratio) OVER (PARTITION BY i.u_mkt_act, l.u_country, df.startdate, i.u_seg, df.dur) AS df_qty, df.startdate, i.u_mkt_act, l.u_country, i.u_seg FROM scpomgr.dfutoskufcst df, scpomgr.item i, scpomgr.loc l, scpomgr.udt_fcst_netting_config u WHERE df.item = i.item AND i .u_mkt_act = u.market_act AND df.skuloc = l.loc and l.u_country = decode(u.country, 'ALL', l.u_country) AND i.u_seg = u.segment and u.scope='GMW' ORDER BY startdate), t1 as ( select t.*, ((df_qty/dc.numdays_month)*dc.past_days) as partial_gross_fcst, ((df_qty/dc.numdays_month)*dc.days_month) as rem_gross_fcst from t, DATE_CALC dc where t.startdate = dc.mth ) select * from t1
_sql_text_map.fs65f1trnn5gp: UPDATE /*+PARALLEL (f, 10) append */ SCPOMGR.UDT_STAT_FCST F SET QTY = 0 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT /*+ parallel (d, 10)*/ 1 FROM SCPOMGR.FCSTDRAFT D WHERE TYPE IN (1, 4, 8) AND D.DMDUNIT = F.DMDUNIT AND D.DMDGROUP = F.DMDGROUP AND D.LOC = F.LOC AND D.STARTDATE = F.STARTDATE ) AND QTY <> 0
_sql_text_map.ftzxbzrg3xzbr: MERGE /*+ PARALLEL (d, 10) append */ INTO SCPOMGR.UDT_STAT_FCST D USING (SELECT /*+ PARALLEL (fd, 10) */ FD.DMDUNIT, FD.DMDGROUP, FD.LOC, STARTDATE, DUR, SUM(QTY) STATFCST FROM SCPOMGR.FCSTDRAFT FD, SCPOMGR.DFU DV WHERE TYPE IN (1, 4, 8) AND FD.DMDUNIT = DV.DMDUNIT AND FD.DMDGROUP = DV.DMDGROUP AND FD.LOC = DV.LOC AND FD.MODEL = DV.MODEL AND U_LEVEL = 'MAT-Customer-Loc' AND U_MANUAL_FCST = 0 GROUP BY FD.DMDUNIT, FD.DMDGROUP, FD.LOC, STARTDATE, DUR) S ON (S.DMDUNIT=D.DMDUNIT AND S.DMDGROUP=D.DMDGROUP AND S.LOC=D.LOC AND S.STARTDATE=D.STARTDATE) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET D.QTY = S.STATFCST WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT /*+ APPEND */ (D.DMDUNIT, D.DMDGROUP, D.LOC , D.STARTDATE, D.DUR, D.QTY, D.SLSFCST) VALUES (S.DMDUNIT, S.DMDGROUP, S.LOC, S.STARTDATE, S.DUR, S.STATFCST, S.STATFCST)
_sql_text_map.fxsgvypw8gd4m: SELECT /*+ PARALLEL */ COUNT(DISTINCT DMDUNIT) FROM SCPOMGR.DMDUNIT WHERE U_MTO_HEADER_MAT_FLAG=1 AND U_DUM_MAT_FLAG=1 AND U_LEVEL3=:B1 AND (U_PROD_GRP IS NULL OR U_PROD_GRP='NOT_AVAILABLE')
_sql_text_map.g8aqtr39q296s: insert /*+ APPEND */ into scpomgr.dfumap(map, todmdunit, todmdgroup, todfuloc, fromdmdunit, fromdmdgroup, fromdfuloc, frommodel, tomodel, eff, disc) SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(8) */ * FROM ( select /*+ paralell(d2, 8) parallel(d1, 8) index_ffs(d2 indx_dfu_lvl) index_ffs(dmdgroup INDX_DMDGROUP_LVL) index_ffs(loc indx_loc_lvl) INDEX(D1 INDX_DFU_LEVEL) INDEX(D2 INDX_DFU_LEVEL) */ DISTINCT 'KICE_121_122_534' MAP, DMDUNIT.U_LEVEL5 TODMDUNIT, DMDGROUP.U_KISOLDTO_REGION TODMDGROUP, LOC.U_ALL TODFULOC, DMDUNIT.DMDUNIT FROMDMDUNIT, DMDGROUP.U_COUNTRY FROMDMDGROUP, LOC.U_COUNTRY FROMDFULOC, D2.MODEL TOMODEL, D1.MODEL FROMMODEL, D2.EFF, D2.DISC from SCPOMGR.DMDUNIT , SCPOMGR.DMDGROUP, SCPOMGR.LOC, SCPOMGR.DFU D1, SCPOMGR.DFU D2 where DMDUNIT.U_MKT_ACT='121' AND DMDGROUP.U_KISOLDTO_REGION='KICE' AND D1.DMDUNIT = DMDUNIT.U_LEVEL5 AND D1.DMDGROUP = DMDGROUP.U_KISOLDTO_REGI ON AND D1.LOC = LOC.U_ALL AND D2.DMDUNIT = DMDUNIT.DMDUNIT AND D2.DMDGROUP = DMDGROUP.U_COUNTRY AND D2.LOC = LOC.U_COUNTRY AND D2.U_LEVEL = 'MAT-Country-Country' AND D1.U_LEVEL = 'MA-Region-ALL') iv WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(8) */ 1 FROM SCPOMGR.DFUMAP WHERE DFUMAP.TODMDUNIT=iv.TODMDUNIT and DFUMAP.TODMDGROUP=iv.TODMDGROUP and DFUMAP.TODFULOC=iv.TODFULOC and DFUMAP.TOMODEL=iv.TOMODEL AND DFUMAP.FROMDMDUNIT=iv.FROMDMDUNIT and DFUMAP.FROMDMDGROUP=iv.FROMDMDGROUP and DFUMAP.FROMDFULOC=iv.FROMDFULOC and DFUMAP.FROMMODEL=iv.FROMMODEL )
